subject: DNC Updates and Events [October 15 2020]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-
In less than 30 minutes we hope you’ll [tune in to watch](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1d08027eac&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Vice President Joe Biden’s town hall tonight at 8pm ET on ABC. Tonight, he will be discussing the issues that matter most to voters. Simultaneously, the DNC War Room will be fact checking Trump’s lies during his event via [@DNCWarRoom](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c8657c12a5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and press releases.
Vice President Biden was prepared to accept the debate commission’s proposal for a virtual town hall, but Trump refused because he does not want to face questions from the voters about his failures on COVID and the economy. Given Trump’s refusal to participate in this week’s planned town hall debate, we hope the Debate Commission will make the final October 22 debate a town hall format, so Trump is not able to evade accountability. Voters should have a chance to directly ask questions of both candidates at the same time. There are several ways you can amplify Vice President Biden’s ABC News town hall tonight:
* Remind your networks about [tonight’s event](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a92d5fc8af&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on ABC
* Download Greenfly and share the latest content on social media
* Amplify [iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2a7f78a711&e=d6c5c7d7ec) as a resource for voters during the last 19 days of the election

We are 19 days out from November 3, and I could not be more excited about the momentum we are seeing in the states. Voters across the country are breaking turnout records, and more than [17 million ballots](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9b5970b2ca&e=d6c5c7d7ec) have already been cast! As determined voters turn out in droves, Democrats are continuing to fight back against voter suppression and ensure every voter has a chance to make their voice heard in this election.
I commend the work of Harris County, Texas Clerk Chris Hollis and Judge Lina Hidalgo. They have taken obstacles created by Republicans and turned them into opportunities for voters, creating [drive-thru voting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b375dcfe3a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for the first time in Texas’ history. During an interview with reporters, Judge Hidalgo said, “We shouldn’t let ourselves be discouraged or muzzled by the state’s actions.” Even in the midst of such unscrupulous tactics, the will to vote remains undeterred.
I am loving the wonderful attitudes from voters across the battlegrounds. People are proud to have made a plan to vote. These inspiring voters have grit, backbone, and a bit of sass! They are definitely keeping their eyes on the prize.
Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni In this Update:
* Biden Town Hall in Philadelphia
* Amy Coney Barrett’s hearing
* New DNC Video: President Obama Helps Americans Make A Plan To Vote
* DNC War Room Released a New Television Ad, “Tested Positive”
* Download the Vote Joe App
* Campaign, Volunteer, and Phone Banking Opportunities
* Vice President Biden: Updates

**Biden Town Hall in Philadelphia** ABC News announced that it will hold a [town hall with Vice President Joe Biden](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d3b027198b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) tonight at 8PM ET, allowing voters to ask questions less than a month before Election Day. ABC News Chief Anchor George Stephanopoulos will moderate the prime-time event in Philadelphia.

**Amy Coney Barrett’s Hearing**
**Senator Kamala Harris**
Senator Kamala Harris directly stated during the first day of senate hearings that Republicans are more focused on getting a seat on the Supreme Court filled than helping Americans. She stated “Senate Republicans have made it crystal clear that rushing a Supreme Court nomination is more important than helping and supporting the American people who are suffering from a deadly pandemic and a devastating economic crisis.” [WATCH HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5b7d07a189&e=d6c5c7d7ec) **Senator Dianne Feinstein**
In today’s Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, Amy Coney Barrett refused to give Senator Feinstein a straight answer when pressed on whether she'll vote to overturn a woman's right to choose. But we already know that Barrett would roll back the clock on reproductive rights because she has made clear she opposes reproductive choice and has expressed hostility towards Roe v. Wade. [WATCH HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a1b88d0b4c&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **Senator Coons**
Senator Coons made the context of Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination clear: just one week after the election, the Supreme Court will hear a case where Barrett could be the deciding vote to terminate the entire Affordable Care Act, including its protections for people with preexisting conditions. [WATCH HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ac9acf0e8c&e=d6c5c7d7ec): What’s at stake: Health care for more than 20 million; protections for people with Disabilities and patients with preexisting conditions; one of our most critical tools to combating COVID; and more.
* Comprehensive Coverage: The ACA established what are known as “essential health benefits,” mandating coverage of services like prescription drugs and hospitalization. Coronavirus testing and treatment are essential health benefits and must be covered by all ACA-compliant plans.

* Access To Critical Vaccinations Without Cost Sharing: Once a coronavirus vaccine is developed, the Affordable Care Act will almost certainly cover the coronavirus vaccine without cost-sharing, because it requires plans to cover all vaccinations recommended by the CDC’s Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP). Joe Biden has also [committed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e552dda760&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to ensuring a vaccine for COVID-19 is cost-free for Americans.

* Protections For As Many As 133 Million Americans with Disabilities and Preexisting Conditions: Under the ACA, insurance companies are not allowed to discriminate against those with preexisting conditions by denying them coverage or charging higher rates.

* Coverage for 20+ Million People: Because of the ACA, more than 20 million Americans gained health coverage. People with insurance are much more likely to see a doctor when they are sick and to get the treatment they need.

* Increased CDC Funding: The Affordable Care Act established the CDC Prevention and Public Health Fund, which helps states prepare for disease outbreaks.

* Medicaid Expansion: Because of the ACA, states can get additional federal money to expand Medicaid to vulnerable populations. More than 17 million Americans now have coverage through Medicaid expansion. Importantly, Medicaid’s funding structure allows funds to increase in response to a public health emergency like coronavirus.

* Key Support For Rural Hospitals: The ACA significantly reduced uncompensated care costs. Between 2013 and 2015, hospitals’ uncompensated care costs decreased by $12 billion, or roughly 30 percent. As hospitals face an influx in coronavirus patients, it is critical that they are paid for the treatment they provide.

**New DNC Video: President Obama Helps Americans Make A Plan To Vote** The DNC released new,[ state-specific voter education videos](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7f6353bba1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) featuring former President Barack Obama, who encourages Americans to visit[ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=93b618cf48&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to learn about their different options to cast their ballot and make a plan to vote today. [WATCH HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a978c3bfc4&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **DNC War Room released a new television ad, “[Tested Positive](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8f7d90d18c&e=d6c5c7d7ec),”**

The DNC War Room released a new television ad, “[Tested Positive](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5bbefb0a1c&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” that highlights how, even after contracting the coronavirus, Trump continues to put lives at risk by ignoring experts, holding in-person superspreader events, and lying to the American people. His behavior continues to put lives at risk.
* Trump’s reckless and erratic behavior is making the coronavirus crisis worse.
* Trump is endangering Americans by continuing to lie about COVID-19 while restarting potential superspreader events.
* Even after Dr. Fauci said Trump hosted a “[superspreader event](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=177c76caca&e=d6c5c7d7ec)” and warned that Trump’s crowded in-person rallies were “[asking for trouble](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e82ef1414a&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” Trump has ignored public health guidelines and held packed, largely maskless rallies.
* Trump misled Americans by using Dr. Fauci’s months-old comments[ out of context](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3a108c53b3&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and without his permission in a campaign ad, and this morning is attacking Fauci, the nation’s leading infectious disease expert.
* The White House won’t be transparent with the American people and is[ refusing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5853780965&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to say when Trump last tested negative for the coronavirus prior to his diagnosis.

**DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP** Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the [Vote Joe app](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bfbfd96bb4&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign.

**CAMPAIGN, PHONE BANKING, AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES**
Full-Time Paid Positions
2020 Victory is seeking Regional Get Out the Vote Directors to help battleground states implement GOTV and Early Vote programming. You can read the job description and apply [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=88b5c59154&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Ideal candidates are available to start ASAP and live in their state.

Check out pages for the [DNC Coordinated Campaign](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a43fcde94b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Biden for President](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cfe54151f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for additional job openings.
**Volunteer Late Help** In the final stretch, we want you and your community to volunteer with us! We have a wide variety of opportunities for volunteers depending on availability, experience and location. We have in person and virtual roles to ensure that everyone has an opportunity to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala HarrisThere are many ways to engage and support the campaign based on what works best for you and your community. We can also connect directly with any organization to coordinate larger partnerships. **1\. In Person Opportunities: **
* Canvassing: We have opportunities for volunteers to knock doors in many battleground states. Each of these states has enacted measures to ensure and prioritize the health and safety of all of our volunteers, staff, and voters. Volunteers will need their own transportation and will have to attend a mandatory virtual training before canvassing. [Find the list of canvassing opportunities HERE.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=95cd567c7b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Voter Activation Centers Leads: To support our in-person activities, we will have supply hubs which will store required items for in-person activities, such as literature, yard signs, and more to support canvassing, visibility and line management. We will need late help volunteers to staff and coordinate activities in these hubs during GOTV. [Sign Up Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9b76d4821e&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Other Late Help Roles (Full Time Commitment): Volunteers will be assigned to a state to be part of their voter contact or other GOTV needs. These volunteers may take on special projects or organizing roles. Example Roles: Special Projects, Organizers, Advance Leads, Training Leads. [Sign Up Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a7981e005&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**2\. Virtual Opportunities: **
* Make Calls: Sign up for a Distributed Organizing Phone Bank shift (Training Required): [http://bit.ly/traincallcrew ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=283b001462&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Text Voters: Sign up for a Distributed Organizing Text Banking shift (Training Required): [http://bit.ly/traintext ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bd27b58c9a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Attend a relational organizing strategy session: http://bit.ly/relationalstrategy
* Join Distributed Slack (The Distributed team’s online field office):

[https://2020victory.io/generalslack ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=00d4d87a53&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
**Join the Call Crew**
If you’re not able to join for a stretch of time but want to help the campaign, you can make calls or send texts from home. Join the [call crew](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7fcf27fe4b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) or [text team](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a96be750e&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and find more opportunities at the Biden for President [Action Center](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=93eaa864d7&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Please share these links with friends and family!

**Voter Protection Hotline Support**
We still need thousands more voter protection team members ready to help ensure eligible voters can cast a ballot. There are only a few weeks left to recruit the additional help we need. Join us for a phone bank to help with this effort! This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot!

[National Voter Assistance Hotline!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0f7b18de2e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) (833-DEM-VOTE)
* Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection
* When: Now! We have shifts every day!
* What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by staffing the national voter protection hotline, answer questions from voters around the country and help people exercise their right to vote!
* Why is it urgent: Voting has started in many states and more people than ever are calling our hotline with questions about how to request their ballot in the mail or navigate in person voting this fall. This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot!
* Length of Commitment: A shift is typically 3 hours.

**Voter Protection Attorneys** Poll Worker Opportunities/Volunteering on the ground: [DNC](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f3b33c9aa1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [BFP](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=412677f661&e=d6c5c7d7ec) may have in-person opportunities for attorneys to assist with election efforts on the ground.
DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection

The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. We are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. We also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=39273fef71&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
**Phonebanking: **
* Team Biden Campaign Disability Coalition Weekly Phone Bank Action 7:00pm-9:00pm ET every Wednesday. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=10972db95e&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Veterans Military Families and Friends 4:30 to 6:00pm EST every Monday through November 2. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2006336659&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action Weekly Phonebank (Every Saturday at 2 PM ET): Join Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action and Higher Heights PAC each Saturday to make calls into key battleground states so we can win big this November. And with special guest, Congressional Candidate Desiree Tims! [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f986e67fa4&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Women in Power Hour Phone Bank (Every Sunday at 2 PM ET): Every week, we adopt a different swing state and make calls for an hour! [RSVP HERE.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=00e665e699&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* All Women for Biden Events: We have so many ways to take action every week, across all our different identities. [Check out the full list here. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=565abf76f1&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Women for Biden Weekly Phone Bank- Women across the United States come together to phone bank for Vice President Joe Biden! This phone bank includes a short training at the beginning of the event. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9837223987&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Women for Biden: Millennials & Gen Z Weekly phone bank-Join young women from across the country every Wednesday night at 8pm ET for a virtual phone bank to help elect Joe Biden. Training will be provided every Wednesday at the start of the call. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b4ac658cb8&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Texas Muslim Phonebanking for Biden. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=67aa3c841b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* National AAPIs for Biden Weekly Call & AAPIs Assemble! Join Asian Americans & Pacific Islanders (AAPIs) for Biden every Wednesday through Election Day, as we come together--or Assemble! to hear from leaders and surrogates from the AAPI community during our National AAPI Program at 7:00 PM ET/ 4:00 PM PT. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8f02a1b03b&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Spanish-language voter contact events (Phone banks, text banks). Join various Spanish language events across the US, including phone banks, text banks, house parties and planning meetings with Latino communities. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d7adfe18e7&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Latino Victory & Todos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=aef14c255e&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Dominicanos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e4a479d5d2&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Venezolanos con Biden: Haz Llamadas a Florida! Virtual Phone Bank. Join the Venezolanos con Biden team every Saturday from 2-4pm ET and make phone calls to voters in South Florida to support Joe Biden and all Democrats on the ballot. In this online event we will provide phone banking training and then we'll start making calls! We will have a facilitator to answer any questions for the duration of the phone bank. We will make calls into South Florida to Spanish and English speaking voters. Every vote counts and every call made brings us closer to victory in November. Volunteer with us and help us create change! Every Saturday at 2pm ET. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=55532025a3&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**Vice President Biden: Updates**
* Vice President Biden traveled to Florida where he delivered remarks on his vision for older Americans and encouraged Floridians to make a plan to vote. Biden’s visit to Broward County stood in stark contrast to Trump’s mostly unmasked and irresponsible rally in Sanford, Florida earlier this week. You can watch full remarks of[ Pembroke Pines](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3d1ce0133f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and[ Miramar](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=262539304d&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* HBCU Times published Senator Kamala Harris’s[ op-ed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=26f403d0ad&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on the Biden-Harris pledge to HBCUs (Historically Black Colleges and Universities) and MSIs (Minority-Serving Institutions) in its fall issue. As a graduate of Howard University, Senator Harris writes that “every signal that we students received at Howard told us that we could be anything. We could come as we were and leave as the people we aspired to be."
* Biden for President launched “[Looks Out](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fea43714b4&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” a seniors-targeted ad featuring a testimonial from Mike Miller, a Michigan steelworker, about the importance of protecting Social Security.
* Biden for President released a new national ad series featuring millennial men in conversation and a rap battle ad with Ultimate Rap League, as the campaign continues its efforts to mobilize Black voters. The “Conversation Series” highlights four young Black men discussing issues impacting Black communities. The series includes five different ads, “[Bottom Line](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=87dd2f777f&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” “[Hate](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8514eee4fb&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” “[Just Say](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=41fb53c852&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” “[Silenced](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=55956178e9&e=d6c5c7d7ec)” and “[Resources](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=575168c7a6&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” ranging from 15-seconds to 60-seconds.
* This week, Vice President Joe Biden traveled to Ohio to talk about the economic pain working families across the state have felt as a result of President Trump’s broken promises to workers— from the closure of GM’s Lordstown plant to Trump’s threats to thousands of Ohio jobs by calling for a Goodyear boycott — and discussed his “Build Back Better” plan that will create millions of good-paying manufacturing jobs and revitalize the American auto industry. You can watch his full remarks in Toledo[ HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=30fd65ad70&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and in Cincinnati[ HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5495438bf1&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Dr. Jill Biden traveled to the Atlanta Metro area and Columbus, Georgia, to encourage voters to cast their ballots by voting early in person. Biden joined an early vote event in DeKalb County before meeting with military and veteran families in Columbus, Georgia. At both stops, she encouraged Georgians to make a plan to vote by going to[ iwillvote.com/GA](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f595c5a3f8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Doug Emhoff traveled to Huntington Woods, Brighton, and Lansing, Michigan. He participated in a Jewish Americans for Biden listening session with Congressman Andy Levin in Huntington Woods before traveling to Brighton for a canvass kickoff. After, he traveled to Lansing where he joined a voter mobilization event with Governor Gretchen Whitmer, Senator Debbie Stabenow, and Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel.
* Biden for President held a virtual event celebrating National Indigenous Peoples Day. The event featured remarks from Congresswoman Sharice Davids, and Congresswoman Deb Haaland, tribal leaders including President Fawn Sharp of the Quinault Indian Nation, President Bryan Newland of Bay Mills and Chairman Cedric Cromwell from Mashpee Wampanoag, and messages from Senator Elizabeth Warren and Mayor Pete Buttigeg. The event featured musical performances from Native artists Levi Platero, Supaman and the Cozad Singers.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends- In less than 30 minutes we hope you’ll Vice President Joe Biden’s town hall tonight at 8pm ET on ABC. Tonight, he will be discussing the issues that matter most to voters. Simultaneously, the DNC War Room will be fact checking Trump’s lies during his event via and press releases. Vice President Biden was prepared to accept the debate commission’s proposal for a virtual town hall, but Trump refused because he does not want to face questions from the voters about his failures on COVID and the economy. Given Trump’s refusal to participate in this week’s planned town hall debate, we hope the Debate Commission will make the final October 22 debate a town hall format, so Trump is not able to evade accountability. Voters should have a chance to directly ask questions of both candidates at the same time. There are several ways you can amplify Vice President Biden’s ABC News town hall tonight: Remind your networks about on ABC Download Greenfly and share the latest content on social media Amplify as a resource for voters during the last 19 days of the election We are 19 days out from November 3, and I could not be more excited about the momentum we are seeing in the states. Voters across the country are breaking turnout records, and more than have already been cast! As determined voters turn out in droves, Democrats are continuing to fight back against voter suppression and ensure every voter has a chance to make their voice heard in this election. I commend the work of Harris County, Texas Clerk Chris Hollis and Judge Lina Hidalgo. They have taken obstacles created by Republicans and turned them into opportunities for voters, creating for the first time in Texas’ history. During an interview with reporters, Judge Hidalgo said, “We shouldn’t let ourselves be discouraged or muzzled by the state’s actions.” Even in the midst of such unscrupulous tactics, the will to vote remains undeterred. I am loving the wonderful attitudes from voters across the battlegrounds. People are proud to have made a plan to vote. These inspiring voters have grit, backbone, and a bit of sass! They are definitely keeping their eyes on the prize. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni In this Update: Biden Town Hall in Philadelphia Amy Coney Barrett’s hearing New DNC Video: President Obama Helps Americans Make A Plan To Vote DNC War Room Released a New Television Ad, “Tested Positive” Download the Vote Joe App Campaign, Volunteer, and Phone Banking Opportunities Vice President Biden: Updates Biden Town Hall in Philadelphia ABC News announced that it will hold a tonight at 8PM ET, allowing voters to ask questions less than a month before Election Day. ABC News Chief Anchor George Stephanopoulos will moderate the prime-time event in Philadelphia. Amy Coney Barrett’s Hearing Senator Kamala Harris Senator Kamala Harris directly stated during the first day of senate hearings that Republicans are more focused on getting a seat on the Supreme Court filled than helping Americans. She stated “Senate Republicans have made it crystal clear that rushing a Supreme Court nomination is more important than helping and supporting the American people who are suffering from a deadly pandemic and a devastating economic crisis.” Senator Dianne Feinstein In today’s Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, Amy Coney Barrett refused to give Senator Feinstein a straight answer when pressed on whether she'll vote to overturn a woman's right to choose. But we already know that Barrett would roll back the clock on reproductive rights because she has made clear she opposes reproductive choice and has expressed hostility towards Roe v. Wade. : Senator Coons Senator Coons made the context of Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination clear: just one week after the election, the Supreme Court will hear a case where Barrett could be the deciding vote to terminate the entire Affordable Care Act, including its protections for people with preexisting conditions. : What’s at stake: Health care for more than 20 million; protections for people with Disabilities and patients with preexisting conditions; one of our most critical tools to combating COVID; and more. Comprehensive Coverage: The ACA established what are known as “essential health benefits,” mandating coverage of services like prescription drugs and hospitalization. Coronavirus testing and treatment are essential health benefits and must be covered by all ACA-compliant plans. Access To Critical Vaccinations Without Cost Sharing: Once a coronavirus vaccine is developed, the Affordable Care Act will almost certainly cover the coronavirus vaccine without cost-sharing, because it requires plans to cover all vaccinations recommended by the CDC’s Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP). Joe Biden has also to ensuring a vaccine for COVID-19 is cost-free for Americans. Protections For As Many As 133 Million Americans with Disabilities and Preexisting Conditions: Under the ACA, insurance companies are not allowed to discriminate against those with preexisting conditions by denying them coverage or charging higher rates. Coverage for 20+ Million People: Because of the ACA, more than 20 million Americans gained health coverage. People with insurance are much more likely to see a doctor when they are sick and to get the treatment they need. Increased CDC Funding: The Affordable Care Act established the CDC Prevention and Public Health Fund, which helps states prepare for disease outbreaks. Medicaid Expansion: Because of the ACA, states can get additional federal money to expand Medicaid to vulnerable populations. More than 17 million Americans now have coverage through Medicaid expansion. Importantly, Medicaid’s funding structure allows funds to increase in response to a public health emergency like coronavirus. Key Support For Rural Hospitals: The ACA significantly reduced uncompensated care costs. Between 2013 and 2015, hospitals’ uncompensated care costs decreased by $12 billion, or roughly 30 percent. As hospitals face an influx in coronavirus patients, it is critical that they are paid for the treatment they provide. New DNC Video: President Obama Helps Americans Make A Plan To Vote The DNC released new, featuring former President Barack Obama, who encourages Americans to visit to learn about their different options to cast their ballot and make a plan to vote today. : DNC War Room released a new television ad, “,” The DNC War Room released a new television ad, “,” that highlights how, even after contracting the coronavirus, Trump continues to put lives at risk by ignoring experts, holding in-person superspreader events, and lying to the American people. His behavior continues to put lives at risk. Trump’s reckless and erratic behavior is making the coronavirus crisis worse. Trump is endangering Americans by continuing to lie about COVID-19 while restarting potential superspreader events. Even after Dr. Fauci said Trump hosted a “” and warned that Trump’s crowded in-person rallies were “,” Trump has ignored public health guidelines and held packed, largely maskless rallies. Trump misled Americans by using Dr. Fauci’s months-old comments and without his permission in a campaign ad, and this morning is attacking Fauci, the nation’s leading infectious disease expert. The White House won’t be transparent with the American people and is to say when Trump last tested negative for the coronavirus prior to his diagnosis. DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the . Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign. CAMPAIGN, PHONE BANKING, AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES Full-Time Paid Positions 2020 Victory is seeking Regional Get Out the Vote Directors to help battleground states implement GOTV and Early Vote programming. You can read the job description and apply . Ideal candidates are available to start ASAP and live in their state. Check out pages for the and for additional job openings. Volunteer Late Help In the final stretch, we want you and your community to volunteer with us! We have a wide variety of opportunities for volunteers depending on availability, experience and location. We have in person and virtual roles to ensure that everyone has an opportunity to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala HarrisThere are many ways to engage and support the campaign based on what works best for you and your community. We can also connect directly with any organization to coordinate larger partnerships. 1\. In Person Opportunities: Canvassing: We have opportunities for volunteers to knock doors in many battleground states. Each of these states has enacted measures to ensure and prioritize the health and safety of all of our volunteers, staff, and voters. Volunteers will need their own transportation and will have to attend a mandatory virtual training before canvassing. Voter Activation Centers Leads: To support our in-person activities, we will have supply hubs which will store required items for in-person activities, such as literature, yard signs, and more to support canvassing, visibility and line management. We will need late help volunteers to staff and coordinate activities in these hubs during GOTV. . Other Late Help Roles (Full Time Commitment): Volunteers will be assigned to a state to be part of their voter contact or other GOTV needs. These volunteers may take on special projects or organizing roles. Example Roles: Special Projects, Organizers, Advance Leads, Training Leads. . 2\. Virtual Opportunities: Make Calls: Sign up for a Distributed Organizing Phone Bank shift (Training Required): Text Voters: Sign up for a Distributed Organizing Text Banking shift (Training Required): Attend a relational organizing strategy session: Join Distributed Slack (The Distributed team’s online field office): Join the Call Crew If you’re not able to join for a stretch of time but want to help the campaign, you can make calls or send texts from home. Join the or , and find more opportunities at the Biden for President . Please share these links with friends and family! Voter Protection Hotline Support We still need thousands more voter protection team members ready to help ensure eligible voters can cast a ballot. There are only a few weeks left to recruit the additional help we need. Join us for a phone bank to help with this effort! This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot! (833-DEM-VOTE) Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection When: Now! We have shifts every day! What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by staffing the national voter protection hotline, answer questions from voters around the country and help people exercise their right to vote! Why is it urgent: Voting has started in many states and more people than ever are calling our hotline with questions about how to request their ballot in the mail or navigate in person voting this fall. This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot! Length of Commitment: A shift is typically 3 hours. Voter Protection Attorneys Poll Worker Opportunities/Volunteering on the ground: and may have in-person opportunities for attorneys to assist with election efforts on the ground. DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. We are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. We also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up . Phonebanking: Team Biden Campaign Disability Coalition Weekly Phone Bank Action 7:00pm-9:00pm ET every Wednesday. Register . Veterans Military Families and Friends 4:30 to 6:00pm EST every Monday through November 2. Register . Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action Weekly Phonebank (Every Saturday at 2 PM ET): Join Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action and Higher Heights PAC each Saturday to make calls into key battleground states so we can win big this November. And with special guest, Congressional Candidate Desiree Tims! . Women in Power Hour Phone Bank (Every Sunday at 2 PM ET): Every week, we adopt a different swing state and make calls for an hour! All Women for Biden Events: We have so many ways to take action every week, across all our different identities. Women for Biden Weekly Phone Bank- Women across the United States come together to phone bank for Vice President Joe Biden! This phone bank includes a short training at the beginning of the event. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register . Women for Biden: Millennials & Gen Z Weekly phone bank-Join young women from across the country every Wednesday night at 8pm ET for a virtual phone bank to help elect Joe Biden. Training will be provided every Wednesday at the start of the call. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register . Texas Muslim Phonebanking for Biden. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register National AAPIs for Biden Weekly Call & AAPIs Assemble! Join Asian Americans & Pacific Islanders (AAPIs) for Biden every Wednesday through Election Day, as we come together--or Assemble! to hear from leaders and surrogates from the AAPI community during our National AAPI Program at 7:00 PM ET/ 4:00 PM PT. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register . Spanish-language voter contact events (Phone banks, text banks). Join various Spanish language events across the US, including phone banks, text banks, house parties and planning meetings with Latino communities. Register . Latino Victory & Todos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register . Dominicanos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register . Venezolanos con Biden: Haz Llamadas a Florida! Virtual Phone Bank. Join the Venezolanos con Biden team every Saturday from 2-4pm ET and make phone calls to voters in South Florida to support Joe Biden and all Democrats on the ballot. In this online event we will provide phone banking training and then we'll start making calls! We will have a facilitator to answer any questions for the duration of the phone bank. We will make calls into South Florida to Spanish and English speaking voters. Every vote counts and every call made brings us closer to victory in November. Volunteer with us and help us create change! Every Saturday at 2pm ET. Register . Vice President Biden: Updates Vice President Biden traveled to Florida where he delivered remarks on his vision for older Americans and encouraged Floridians to make a plan to vote. Biden’s visit to Broward County stood in stark contrast to Trump’s mostly unmasked and irresponsible rally in Sanford, Florida earlier this week. You can watch full remarks of and. HBCU Times published Senator Kamala Harris’s on the Biden-Harris pledge to HBCUs (Historically Black Colleges and Universities) and MSIs (Minority-Serving Institutions) in its fall issue. As a graduate of Howard University, Senator Harris writes that “every signal that we students received at Howard told us that we could be anything. We could come as we were and leave as the people we aspired to be." Biden for President launched “,” a seniors-targeted ad featuring a testimonial from Mike Miller, a Michigan steelworker, about the importance of protecting Social Security. Biden for President released a new national ad series featuring millennial men in conversation and a rap battle ad with Ultimate Rap League, as the campaign continues its efforts to mobilize Black voters. The “Conversation Series” highlights four young Black men discussing issues impacting Black communities. The series includes five different ads, “,” “,” “,” “” and “,” ranging from 15-seconds to 60-seconds. This week, Vice President Joe Biden traveled to Ohio to talk about the economic pain working families across the state have felt as a result of President Trump’s broken promises to workers— from the closure of GM’s Lordstown plant to Trump’s threats to thousands of Ohio jobs by calling for a Goodyear boycott — and discussed his “Build Back Better” plan that will create millions of good-paying manufacturing jobs and revitalize the American auto industry. You can watch his full remarks in Toledo and in Cincinnati. Dr. Jill Biden traveled to the Atlanta Metro area and Columbus, Georgia, to encourage voters to cast their ballots by voting early in person. Biden joined an early vote event in DeKalb County before meeting with military and veteran families in Columbus, Georgia. At both stops, she encouraged Georgians to make a plan to vote by going to Doug Emhoff traveled to Huntington Woods, Brighton, and Lansing, Michigan. He participated in a Jewish Americans for Biden listening session with Congressman Andy Levin in Huntington Woods before traveling to Brighton for a canvass kickoff. After, he traveled to Lansing where he joined a voter mobilization event with Governor Gretchen Whitmer, Senator Debbie Stabenow, and Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel. Biden for President held a virtual event celebrating National Indigenous Peoples Day. The event featured remarks from Congresswoman Sharice Davids, and Congresswoman Deb Haaland, tribal leaders including President Fawn Sharp of the Quinault Indian Nation, President Bryan Newland of Bay Mills and Chairman Cedric Cromwell from Mashpee Wampanoag, and messages from Senator Elizabeth Warren and Mayor Pete Buttigeg. The event featured musical performances from Native artists Levi Platero, Supaman and the Cozad Singers. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Why I'm running
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

I have just completed our final debate before the general election!

I am running for Congress to ensure the health and safety of all Iowans. As a doctor, I will work for the 2nd district in the same way I have provided care to my patients for decades. I will fight every day to protect the health and well-being of Iowans, to protect people with pre-existing conditions and I will work to find solutions to combat COVID-19 and curb future pandemics.

[J](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=daf98bddce&e=16fac31a0f)[oin the fight by donating $25, $50 or even $100 today!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=f214e3e02a&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tell the GOP: Follow the McConnell Rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Today was the final day of Judge Amy Coney Barrett's hearing before the Senate Judiciary Committee regarding her nomination by President Trump to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court.
Next week, the committee will vote on approving her confirmation, with a full Senate vote expected just one week before Election Day on November 3. In a naked partisan power grab, Republicans are breaking their own precedent from 2016 by rushing through this process.
**[Peter, will you join me in speaking out and demanding that Senate Republicans follow the McConnell Rule? Add your name to my petition right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45f6/42ab3cf4/66468ebc/135d1239/185558573/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/tell-the-gop-follow-the-mcconnell-rule?source=em201015i_1044&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
President Trump promised a Supreme Court nominee who would overturn the Affordable Care Act -- and Republicans are counting on Judge Amy Coney Barrett to do just that on the Supreme Court. We can't stand by while Republicans confirm another justice who supports their agenda.
There is an orange cloud hanging over the confirmation of Judge Barrett -- and the timing is certainly suspect. Why are Republicans in such a hurry to confirm a Supreme Court Justice when voting has already started across the country? No justice has ever been confirmed this close to an election -- but the GOP needs a Justice Barrett on the Court to decide on the fate of the ACA.
On November 10, just one week after the election, Republicans will be arguing at the Supreme Court that the ACA is unconstitutional -- and that millions of people in Illinois and across the nation should lose their access to affordable health care and pre-existing condition protections.
That's what's on the line in this fight -- and why we need to keep speaking out and fighting back.
**[The American people should have their say before this vacancy is filled. Sign on now to call on the Senate GOP to stop this sham confirmation and follow the McConnell Rule.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45f6/42ab3cf4/66468ebc/135d1239/185558573/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/tell-the-gop-follow-the-mcconnell-rule?source=em201015i_1044&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45f6/42ab3cf4/66468ebc/135d1239/185558573/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/tell-the-gop-follow-the-mcconnell-rule?source=em201015i_1044&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45f6/42ab3cf4/66468ebc/135d123a/185558573/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45f6/42ab3cf4/66468ebc/135d123b/185558573/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: HERSCHEL WALKER ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER AS "GAME CHANGER" IN NEW AD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, OCTOBER 16, 2020
HERSCHEL WALKER ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER AS "GAME CHANGER" IN NEW AD
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released a new ad titled "[Game Changer](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVwW0iM_c9zXgWrif8853FZ45meCVvrcc8FwcKF-tpS-3FvYcTMLleL5qCseuYTZvfauRopUhEaGFof6mTEmI18zZaKdl3c6aPrUcCjBxgsO3cHYLJ19dp8wqhTFcOa4xlRscHE020FwtTYYGWd8_BUIoVOK6Bygwtiu0a90Z90IAO3lZ8qQ8bisOQKbhCbTnQKzeEji6l0=&c=DWOdvD6DOoo7hcQWsZ6QjMOMXWR75CMbGpDH_9dZB2IQau5JhP-7Gg==&ch=iiR0lQ3BolFM-l9GIf3q-b1JDkyTzxDtwPJVtjwujfX53YSHnjydoA==)," highlighting her endorsement from UGA Heisman Trophy winner and National Championship football player, Herschel Walker. Walker's status as one of if not the greatest college football player of all time has made him a household name in Georgia, and he remains one of the most popular and beloved figures across the state. Walker has also been a champion for conservative causes and an ardent supporter and powerful surrogate for President Trump.
The ad showcases Senator Loeffler's [100-percent](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVwW0iM_c9zXgWrif8853FZ45meCVvrcc8FwcKF-tpS-3FvYcTMLlTtrE5j4TyE8Ie6KKxPtT-hpGFtqVyUFK5RDTYUjGTgBLeBhnCgZkWI0XbLxri3RakSKJqG90ySg98dnIhEA41nElp2uNBPp5bT11zsTOqinqb9sOsFDR_v2kDi1KPScX5q9oz35tbU7X0tCCCkxEkKsi8x2-K1DRQ==&c=DWOdvD6DOoo7hcQWsZ6QjMOMXWR75CMbGpDH_9dZB2IQau5JhP-7Gg==&ch=iiR0lQ3BolFM-l9GIf3q-b1JDkyTzxDtwPJVtjwujfX53YSHnjydoA==) Trump voting record, her [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVwW0iM_c9zXgWrif8853FZ45meCVvrcc8FwcKF-tpS-3FvYcTMLlf62cAkzgX_2wa9omC1lds8FrBt56AqSsekT5lWLCVR31mGx_dk-VarwvKjaMPG3_AC48vGAXdb69MkeDjIch9WpdoGSl9Ij9aNrb1XxgPGBGr8D35kOqCS0plViLP06xQ-FB8al7SyYdpkZfvmGPKXeB5tuCgOmehq9iA5TjSpoTWNwilxtc0c=&c=DWOdvD6DOoo7hcQWsZ6QjMOMXWR75CMbGpDH_9dZB2IQau5JhP-7Gg==&ch=iiR0lQ3BolFM-l9GIf3q-b1JDkyTzxDtwPJVtjwujfX53YSHnjydoA==) by National Right to Life, and her refusal to back down to the fake news media and the radical [cancel culture](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVwW0iM_c9zXgWrif8853FZ45meCVvrcc8FwcKF-tpS-3FvYcTMLldFiKnLSdCYQRV2hko_GQ_t5J0AyTRQStPco107-4Dx0s2zKEDmbw7Auice8WHC7eUeHPKjMLk518a0uAt7irWM5VAhCe8ZJVZv9VfFUxaahvJRv5tikch1zuFMKAMKJqOyoqDHeukwo&c=DWOdvD6DOoo7hcQWsZ6QjMOMXWR75CMbGpDH_9dZB2IQau5JhP-7Gg==&ch=iiR0lQ3BolFM-l9GIf3q-b1JDkyTzxDtwPJVtjwujfX53YSHnjydoA==).
Click the photo below to view the ad:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVwW0iM_c9zXgWrif8853FZ45meCVvrcc8FwcKF-tpS-3FvYcTMLleL5qCseuYTZL0Phc5xzKUsgvnTtWqWc3JRmyHA2_H1WQbTL1Udd_Zx-EsvJTolwOZZWvGeaGzVsI21n4V2J2L_ibyPu0ARmhg==&c=DWOdvD6DOoo7hcQWsZ6QjMOMXWR75CMbGpDH_9dZB2IQau5JhP-7Gg==&ch=iiR0lQ3BolFM-l9GIf3q-b1JDkyTzxDtwPJVtjwujfX53YSHnjydoA==)

Kelly's 100-percent Trump, endorsed by the Right to Life, and standing up to the radical cancel culture.
I'm proud to support Kelly. Take it from me Herschel, she's a game changer for Georgia."

name: Dean Browning, Chairman
subject: We Must Restore Our Liberty!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
The very fabric of our society is being torn apart by far Left-Liberal Radicals. Characters such as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC are more concerned with government control than they are about anything else. We need your support today to fight against these Socialists disguised as Liberals! Will you donate $25, $10, or even just $5 today to continue our fight against their socialist policies that will turn the United States into Venezuela? Slowly but surely, they are tearing apart what it means to be an American Patriot and stripping the American people of their fundamental rights. The record shows itself:
* Weaponizing a pandemic to shut down businesses and schools, destroying the middle class, and instilling fear.
* Supporting the "Green New Deal," which would result in the loss of hundreds of thousands of jobs, crash the economy, and force the U.S. to be dependent on foreign countries for energy.
* Defunding the police and leaving neighborhoods, particularly minority and low-income neighborhoods, to fend for themselves against violent criminals.
* Grant amnesty to all illegal immigrants, including dangerous MS-13 gang members.
* Take away our God-given right to bear arms by promoting gun confiscation.

We're in the final days before the election that we've been preparing for since January 2019 - and what an election season this has been.

Democrats have pulled out every trick in the book to sabotage President Trump and Conservatives all over the country. Simply put, they loathe everything we stand for. In order to keep our operation fully funded through Election Day on November 3rd, **[we've determined that we will need 35,000 donors to make a contribution of $15 or more in the month of October](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56595443:W39MNVKNH:m:1:2247059263:CD294C79A6401E4B832757F15BBCB289:r)** ; that is 1,129 donors every day between now and October 31st.

We've fallen a bit behind, so we're doubling down on our daily goal for the next three days. **[Before Sunday at midnight we need 6,774 conservatives to pitch in $15 or more if we're going to stay on track to reach our October donation goal.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56595443:W39MNVKNH:m:1:2247059263:CD294C79A6401E4B832757F15BBCB289:r)

Peter, this is the most important month for raising funds in the entire election cycle, and we cannot come up short.

**[Will you chip-in right now so we stay on track to hit our goal at the end of the month?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56595442:W39MNVKNH:m:1:2247059263:CD294C79A6401E4B832757F15BBCB289:r) **

Mark Warner, Rep. name: Ralph Northam
subject: Let's keep Abby Spanberger in Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FbBREk6vpTCr_QaRqZom_q4pvHDdL752Ck2IynNvcmY=/dEL6aQfReQn4-Ge1LSxTMIbTvgnFx9NwEtSOdDNXY5Y=) _Here at The Way Ahead PAC, we recognize that our world is going through a very uncertain and difficult time right now --a time when it's hard to think of anything but the well-being of our own family and friends. Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._
---
Friend, I have always believed that we can find ways to work together while still staying true to your core beliefs. I know firsthand that when we approach public service with passion and bipartisan cooperation, we can get results. These are my leadership values, and I see these traits profoundly in Abigail Spanberger. [Contribute now to join me in supporting her campaign for re-election. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/FbBREk6vpTCr_QaRqZom_q4pvHDdL752Ck2IynNvcmY=/dEL6aQfReQn4-Ge1LSxTMIbTvgnFx9NwEtSOdDNXY5Y=) Abigail is routinely rated as one of the most bipartisan members of the House, and she has a gift for building coalitions and bringing people together for a common cause. She has the courage to take on entrenched special interests and do what's right for Virginia. This makes her an incredible asset to our Commonwealth. One of the things I'm most proud of in my career is how I've fought for children. I know that children and young people are the key to Virginia's future. We must provide them with access to opportunities that set them up for a lifetime of success. That's why I'm excited about Abigail's work in Congress. She is dedicated to providing opportunities for the people of Virginia's 7th district. Abigail and I have been committed to investing in broadband internet infrastructure. We are determined to close the gap between Virginians with internet access and those without. Especially now, as children are attending classes virtually and millions of Americans are working from home due to the ongoing Coronavirus pandemic, reliable and accessible internet has become more crucial than ever before. No one should be left behind because of a lack of access. There are less than 3 weeks left until Election Day. To re-elect Abigail we need everyone getting involved. [Will you join me in supporting Abigail Spanberger by donating to her re-election campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/FbBREk6vpTCr_QaRqZom_q4pvHDdL752Ck2IynNvcmY=/dEL6aQfReQn4-Ge1LSxTMIbTvgnFx9NwEtSOdDNXY5Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FbBREk6vpTCr_QaRqZom_q4pvHDdL752Ck2IynNvcmY=/dEL6aQfReQn4-Ge1LSxTMIbTvgnFx9NwEtSOdDNXY5Y=) Thank you, Governor Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/FbBREk6vpTCr_QaRqZom_q4pvHDdL752Ck2IynNvcmY=/sA66Cz3zkvrl4RW_fl9b54-lEQ0qDONqI9m-KjBApsk=) |

name: Team Carney
subject: Moving Delaware Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ewyUAqOhj0R5NO06_sjEjg==/EiK9_eFm4DLkRaJ91YJk7Q==?midqs=MeeIlgE6IoQJ_dJTxZ6Eug==)
---

**MOVING DELAWARE FORWARD**

Since the start of the pandemic, Governor Carney has focused on the dual objectives of a healthy community and a strong economy. He knows it can't be either or **-** we have to have both.
**" We must rebuild an economy that's better prepared for the future. By focusing on support for Delaware's hardest hit businesses, especially small businesses, investing in 21st century infrastructure, including broadband, and building a world-class workforce, Delaware will emerge from these challenges stronger than before." **
-- **Governor John Carney**
That's why Governor Carney will remain focused on bringing new jobs to Delaware and supporting the business owners rooted in our state.
In his first term, Governor Carney worked with the General Assembly to pass the largest-ever infrastructure program in the state - building new schools, modernizing roads and bridges, expanding high-speed broadband, funding clean water infrastructure, and preserving open space.
Governor Carney knows small businesses and their workers are the backbone of our economy. That's why he launched a $150 million grant program - DE Relief - to provide real assistance to help Delaware small businesses during this challenging time.
Governor Carney also expanded the Port of Wilmington and brought jobs to Delaware families.** ** In his second term, Governor Carney will remain focused on bringing more of these good-paying jobs to our state.

**HIGHLIGHTS OF GOVERNOR CARNEY 'S RECORD**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ewyUAqOhj0R5NO06_sjEjg==/9Evoq5eLE6CnkBvldI8Faw==)

**FROM THE TEAM**
We are 18 days away from Election Day. **Make your plan to vote:[ iwillvote.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ewyUAqOhj0R5NO06_sjEjg==/-MdP_M_fmmD0r4CtBj0ZKA==)**

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2acb2481fb60423c9b4edbda1f21068c&_e=RCjevq7ZdyFRVklI98ltWNGela0_SZBXIdDOUpu_7wjt6lxiW3tggM5vs1QzD3DxLCvA9lAL90H6dKCL8iVCRqGV_4s9mt1X81AVo4PTQ7opIeFkHbJQqutQ1FrlG0EJQJ6qHbndY-iz3BL3qXfzNUHbeihHVN0t7AMIKEJIxZatEsOBfYSXm1vTvR_76Vac62Sx0Ol-lrVSNU_EbQgNnYnJt0TyNIGxtjjm3eily7WPRBoySDBtg5gh13KWCKMXU2IVOjoCbzbwOAMcTy8G8-qAc1PcRKnIOzJwK08ga4JTL0FWNayZ3kwloIyIX7LP6ck6Vy37UtQgkXNeWOVYXZx8Osuy6uymfOYRTx5WL7AEVVuZhbW1IBaSjmvZXR6f_VlnoNjMrYzqVRfnxInTtrQJur8Fih6c-ZUHZSn2Nic%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2acb2481fb60423c9b4edbda1f21068c&_e=RCjevq7ZdyFRVklI98ltWNGela0_SZBXIdDOUpu_7wjt6lxiW3tggM5vs1QzD3DxLCvA9lAL90H6dKCL8iVCRqGV_4s9mt1X81AVo4PTQ7opIeFkHbJQqutQ1FrlG0EJQJ6qHbndY-iz3BL3qXfzNUHbeihHVN0t7AMIKEJIxZatEsOBfYSXm1vTvR_76Vac62Sx0Ol-lrVSNU_EbQgNnWk9lvjDyRvhgWSOQSQ0q_eXSbwvd928Z83mwrtE3HH4wUixlXYq9kcEpv6mq8BV-dmx63LZvFeTs_KF1-9Q_c4ZY4-LAlQDv7GorZPuGUHE3RkC9PkYu7ydG9r0kzOVrF7KCkHXPYQ9Ps8nXwQ_MG8G9rMvH9XFNylRWNxpO-MkVj2Ka7AtVqmkR58IN7CdFjMhhIBz-fyAlxeOkJeGw6g%3D)**

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2acb2481fb60423c9b4edbda1f21068c&_e=RCjevq7ZdyFRVklI98ltWNGela0_SZBXIdDOUpu_7wjt6lxiW3tggM5vs1QzD3DxLCvA9lAL90H6dKCL8iVCRqGV_4s9mt1X81AVo4PTQ7opIeFkHbJQqutQ1FrlG0EJQJ6qHbndY-iz3BL3qXfzNUHbeihHVN0t7AMIKEJIxZatEsOBfYSXm1vTvR_76Vac62Sx0Ol-lrVSNU_EbQgNnU8GSAxg4dnge-XL54zj6R1GVlx2Ha-77HDHRUTAohhss62kh4SoWIOE35FCFaom8hfUXIORiWD1vz6XG5QG-4T5w5rdy-tSuT7L9pL2-lBKSPdcifclIyIyvhLB7sBwiqcuwvJNS9XpltcllvDx-D9BPETjuAGHJ3GDAVS6IndKsdZqBcQT6cgN5MayJEcaVwBpGsJAeBvohi2w1z780Rs%3D)**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

But we CANNOT sit back and let Biden do this alone. It 's going to take all of us. We 're ready to do the work, we just need your help to support Biden in battleground states today. That 's why we've launched our $100,000 Battleground Fund goal to prepare for whatever the next few weeks throw our way -- and are waking up every day DEAD SET on defeating Donald Trump. | | | Peter, this is it, we're in the final days of the election, and your donations have even more impact as we race against D.C. dark money to turn out voters for the future of Iowa. All three of these districts could be won by just a few hundred votes, which is why we're teaming up to share resources. **[Now is the BEST time to give because we'll get your donations when we need them most and split them evenly between all our campaigns running to represent real Iowa values. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email)** Thanks for being on our team! \-- Rita Hart **\----- Forwarded Message -----** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email) These 3 Iowa races will be decided by razor-thin margins: **[Donate today to split your donation between the Democrats running in IA-01, IA-02 and IA-03 for a united, blue Iowa!](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email)** | ******[Donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email)******
---
* * *
We're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the resources we need in these final few days of the election.
Dark money GOP groups are flooding Iowa with money, and all these races are projected to be won by razor-thin margins. We need your help to get voters to the polls to send true Iowan values to Washington!
**[There are 19 days until Election Day. Can you donate $30 today to be split evenly between all three Democratic women running in Iowa?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email&amount=30)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email)
Washington insiders think they can run away with these elections and put in place extreme, divisive politicians who will put their party before the people of Iowa.
That's why we're fighting as hard as we can in these final 19 days to reach as many voters as we can!
**[Donate whatever can, even just $19, one dollar for each day between now and Election Day, so we can wake up November 4th to a united, blue Iowa.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email&amount=19)**
Thanks for all your support,
Rita Hart for Congress

******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE WEEKLY](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwMcpHncACAMHqghODDXNZso-I-u1yTIFOhVcYUdSsE=/u4c2NoFIPD7q_73IfXpdwhOJm3AuYQZnX_jrsLmkC5s=?refcode=201016-email&recurring=true)******

The last three years haven’t been easy, but we’ve stuck through this because we know what we’re fighting for is worth it ― _to protect democracy, restore common decency, and advance justice and opportunity._
These ideas aren’t the radical ones Michael McCaul and his rich allies paint them to be. The voters agree, which is why Mike is down _only one point_ in the most recent poll. But if we can’t share our message with the voters, there’s no hope of pulling ahead in this race and sending Mike to Congress. That’s why we need your help today, friend.

clean_body: | | = Hi friends, I’m Hindatu, Mike’s wife. We’re coming up on a moment three years in the making, and we are working as hard as we can to reach voters and share our positive message. But as we get closer to Election Day, the attacks on Mike and the things we’re fighting for are only getting more vicious and more widespread. We have to make sure our message gets out, and isn’t drowned out by all the outside money McCaul’s wealthy supporters are bringing into the race. That’s why I’m asking you today ―= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = The last three years haven’t been easy, but we’ve stuck through this because we know what we’re fighting for is worth it ― to protect democracy, restore common decency, and advance justice and opportunity. These ideas aren’t the radical ones Michael McCaul and his rich allies paint them to be. The voters agree, which is why Mike is down only one point in the most recent poll. But if we can’t share our message with the voters, there’s no hope of pulling ahead in this race and sending Mike to Congress. That’s why we need your help today, friend. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re giving this race our all ― thanks for doing your part to help us finish this out! With love and gratitude, Hindatu | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: This was the inspiration we needed
body:
Peter,
If you caught any of Judge Barrett’s confirmation hearings, you heard a perfect explanation of the proper role of judges, and an incredibly powerful defense of our nation’s founding principles and values, particularly religious liberty and freedom of speech.
If you needed a simple description of what we’ll be fighting for over the next two weeks, you got it.
For those of us steeped in the Judeo-Christian faith, who want our government to defend and promote our values, November 3rd offers a momentous opportunity -- but only if we are aggressive and organized enough to follow through.
**And, when it comes down to it, that means resources. So, we’ve set a big new goal.**
[**_Currently, every single grassroots donation is being matched up to $550,000, but as you read this email, we are still $250,000 short of our goal. It is imperative that we raise it between now and November 3rd and we need your help with a gift today._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201016apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201016apl01nd&n=1 "Donate Today")
I know we’ve asked a lot, but we would not be doing so if it was not so important. You see, we are not just educating people about the stakes of this election. We are trying to reverse history.
Typically, one in four Christians does not vote. It’s not that easy to turn something like that around.
Success requires building a movement, so by leveraging every technological tool available and building a first-class coalition of our nation’s most influential faith leaders, that’s what we’ve been doing. In just over two weeks, we will know if we got the job done.
To me, failure is not an option. And, I know the whole team at My Faith Votes feels the same.
[**_So please, help us hit our $250,000 goal. I know we can get there._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201016apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201016apl01nd&n=2 "Donate Today")
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201016apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201016apl01nd&n=3)
Thanks for your commitment.
Steadfast and Loyal,
Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201016apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201016apl01nd&n=5).

* Confirm she is a **TOP** Pelosi puppet and a shill for a **RADICAL** agenda that would **HURT** South Florida families.

As the Mayor of Miami-Dade Mayor Gimenez has:

subject: We need your help

body:
Friend, President Trump recently nominated Amy Coney Barrett as our nation's next Supreme Court Justice.
Before the nomination was even announced, the Far-Left was already attacking Judge Barrett for her conservative record. If past experiences are any indication of how this will play out, we know this will be one of the biggest fights yet.
Judge Barrett has a strong record for strictly interpreting the Constitution and the principles laid out by our Founding Fathers. The Court could use more people like Judge Barrett.
Friend, the vicious attacks are already underway, which is why we need to be prepared to fight back. Friend, the Senate will be in charge of confirming the next Supreme Court Justice and it is absolutely CRITICAL that we keep the Senate majority. **[Can we count on you to keep the Senate majority?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010XqaZPFmuiLoPFRaS8U108OjI9t4KdNU646GxYfVJkQHwMGgVIc_yP5IX3rANNbT2rSz2n6DjFMNe1_6tpfU3fF95VGdjQWrWpZy8_nmFf8JjNeOiwONd2o3Io_JsuYBNbAUzD-DqGH3oWvcfDY6IFfC6J6we5UwGl2FaIOK-U6AXCzMMyEbnp1VwgAS7G-TcdK9CvzSZPWanNU6iDB7WCQh6UrzRcjjgAzMLuNTKwUpmEEhakcxFZT5yTFke86-DUyZ6FTzAM_wg4wQFuifpFoLkBp9UVPpdshbPC82lUeR0BGMGEz446U_1G0qwigkq6gEveFV9X6oczg2sdGGligEQwrxsbPMwXmSX9XISKI09wgcsbhnYA==&c=YYbjbuRfvl5IM_6Axqmi_7JDl3PvKr_DTGurAJjrPPXiuQ9owSyFNA==&ch=v4Hb3e1BvM5bpcyGJ5xvXgfDQAQaiyFuuh9dVgmJ6qcsF6YxI7jMJA==)**
These radicals will stoop to all time lows to stop President Trump from fulfilling his duty and filling the Supreme Court vacancy. Senator Schumer even recently suggested packing the Supreme Court if the Democrats win the majority in November.
Friend, that is how important this election is. If the Democrats take control they will do anything to implement a radical left ideology.
Will you stand by and let the Democrats rip apart the very fabric of our country because they lost an election? This isn't about politics anymore. This is about doing what's right and the Far-Left's rhetoric has proven that they are unfit to lead.
This Supreme Court appointment will have a major impact on the future of our country and it is absolutely critical that we keep the majority for future generations.
**[We need your help to ensure the Senate stays in Republican hands. Please chip in anything you can now to help us win in November.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010XqaZPFmuiLoPFRaS8U108OjI9t4KdNU646GxYfVJkQHwMGgVIc_yP5IX3rANNbT2rSz2n6DjFMNe1_6tpfU3fF95VGdjQWrWpZy8_nmFf8JjNeOiwONd2o3Io_JsuYBNbAUzD-DqGH3oWvcfDY6IFfC6J6we5UwGl2FaIOK-U6AXCzMMyEbnp1VwgAS7G-TcdK9CvzSZPWanNU6iDB7WCQh6UrzRcjjgAzMLuNTKwUpmEEhakcxFZT5yTFke86-DUyZ6FTzAM_wg4wQFuifpFoLkBp9UVPpdshbPC82lUeR0BGMGEz446U_1G0qwigkq6gEveFV9X6oczg2sdGGligEQwrxsbPMwXmSX9XISKK5KB1Cr7xBMg==&c=YYbjbuRfvl5IM_6Axqmi_7JDl3PvKr_DTGurAJjrPPXiuQ9owSyFNA==&ch=v4Hb3e1BvM5bpcyGJ5xvXgfDQAQaiyFuuh9dVgmJ6qcsF6YxI7jMJA==)**
Sincerely, Mike Pence Vice President of the United States

Before the nomination was even announced, the Far-Left was already attacking Judge Barrett for her conservative record. If past experiences are any indication of how this will play out, we know this will be one of the biggest fights yet. Judge Barrett has a strong record for strictly interpreting the Constitution and the principles laid out by our Founding Fathers. The Court could use more people like Judge Barrett. Friend, the vicious attacks are already underway, which is why we need to be prepared to fight back. Friend, the Senate will be in charge of confirming the next Supreme Court Justice and it is absolutely CRITICAL that we keep the Senate majority. == These radicals will stoop to all time lows to stop President Trump from fulfilling his duty and filling the Supreme Court vacancy. Senator Schumer even recently suggested packing the Supreme Court if the Democrats win the majority in November. Friend, that is how important this election is. If the Democrats take control they will do anything to implement a radical left ideology.
