body:
If you do nothing, you're giving Schumer a hall pass
Friend,
If I've said it once, I've said it 1,000 times: _**the Senate majority will come down to what happens in Maine.**_
[Support a RED Senate Majority HERE ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)
---
Moreover, **what happens in Maine will determine the leadership of the U.S. Senate for years to come.** If Susan is ousted from Congress by the likes of Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, the Hollywood and D.C. elites, and the failed Clinton administrations,**our country 's premier legislative body will be led by left-wing partisans, intent on passing their far-left agenda, no compromise, no bipartisanship, no cooperation.**
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)
[**This is why I need you to support Susan TODAY with a $5, $15, $25, $50 or $100 contribution.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)
The entire Liberal money making-machine is pummeling Maine with false ads and just downright lies, Friend. We must do something about it. We can't let Chuck Schumer, Planned Parenthood and the Defund the Police Movement try **bullying** a common sense leader like Susan.
_**Listen, you may agree what Chuck Schumer is doing - the mockery he 's making of the process of free elections - is wrong. But if you don't stand up for what's right, you're giving Schumer a free pass to keep doing. **_
[_**We must help Susan win. There 's TOO MUCH at stake to ignore the race in Maine. **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)
Friend, please, I hate asking people for money. I know you work hard for each paycheck. But Susan needs you to chip in $5, $10 or $15 before midnight so she can keep her ads on the air, buy postcards and yard signs, and fill-up her campaign tour bus through the end of the month.
[Chip in NOW >>> ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)
---
Thanks for checking out my plan, Friend. I know you'll help save the Senate this November.
Karl
P.S. I'm not afraid to break rank. Neither is Susan. I'm not afraid to disagree with colleagues on my "side of the aisle." Neither is Susan. This is why I respect her so much.
-> Susan has always been an independent voice in Congress. She's not afraid to stand alone to do what's right for her state and country. Susan studies through the night, on planes and buses and on weekends. She works harder than any other Senator -- even when cameras are off and Sara Gideon is hiding away. **Susan has true character and integrity - she'll do the right thing when no one is looking and even when it's not popular. **
[Chip in NOW to support
Common Sense Leadership >>> ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BmpL4pBX1WxHp0QuG9JseoAuT7TJtbcAzaS96-sC07zULCEvtMTfyiA8lk27NdzxxhsJqanZOXW9WbdDQOFgXCndeHvE1kE__gjVWIi8BarhbnJLoTI5nFULqo4Myp-P3c3nngT-hUB48UBq2IAHUxsEvMFbBiuuN0MHyz_2mptZJ4JSdOfNP98JDloJ3veoSlmx3tNUY6nBAnLXweqsgswhQBu3j91o0uSpPCHm94PdqojmoHzXaZL7KWZXZ4RAW6iEacrPOsgr2UGBRYUSMFnz3-j7krBR7YJTQyTbio-bGPhw6BcKX8CIhDTIyYlG1Q3Bl22WmaVQKvP5T9BH34WRgoQ5RvrgZikxaH-J5wH7p-ZBEvEnW2w10THF68o1TYswDSLY4sKpHck_6H6k8Q==&c=Kj6ZJcHEODTl7R6GeTp4ol0rd-rmobWTKwm8kyFnlGbIaMbEs3dO6g==&ch=oydLCYsC4IJykhTOCQsUgL4enhlnnJUAqZ0Lu_49Aia9FJAvMzkA_A==)

clean_body: If you do nothing, you're giving Schumer a hall pass Friend, If I've said it once, I've said it 1,000 times: the Senate majority will come down to what happens in Maine. == Moreover, what happens in Maine will determine the leadership of the U.S. Senate for years to come. If Susan is ousted from Congress by the likes of Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, the Hollywood and D.C. elites, and the failed Clinton administrations,our country 's premier legislative body will be led by left-wing partisans, intent on passing their far-left agenda, no compromise, no bipartisanship, no cooperation. == == The entire Liberal money making-machine is pummeling Maine with false ads and just downright lies, Friend. We must do something about it. We can't let Chuck Schumer, Planned Parenthood and the Defund the Police Movement try bullying a common sense leader like Susan. Listen, you may agree what Chuck Schumer is doing - the mockery he 's making of the process of free elections - is wrong. But if you don't stand up for what's right, you're giving Schumer a free pass to keep doing. == Friend, please, I hate asking people for money. I know you work hard for each paycheck. But Susan needs you to chip in $5, $10 or $15 before midnight so she can keep her ads on the air, buy postcards and yard signs, and fill-up her campaign tour bus through the end of the month. == Thanks for checking out my plan, Friend. I know you'll help save the Senate this November. Karl P.S. I'm not afraid to break rank. Neither is Susan. I'm not afraid to disagree with colleagues on my "side of the aisle." Neither is Susan. This is why I respect her so much. -> Susan has always been an independent voice in Congress. She's not afraid to stand alone to do what's right for her state and country. Susan studies through the night, on planes and buses and on weekends. She works harder than any other Senator -- even when cameras are off and Sara Gideon is hiding away. Susan has true character and integrity - she'll do the right thing when no one is looking and even when it's not popular. == Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. I’m leaving it all on the field, and so is our team. But we need YOU with us if we’re going to surge across the finish line.

_**[Please, help us get there now. We’re counting on you](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aeda6e1c33fe3637/229593188483e0c2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_.

Corky

clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Peter - I wanted to make sure you’d seen my email. Election Day is now only 18 DAYS away. Not only that, today we learned that DC Jeanne Shaheen has raised $18 MILLION to keep this seat blue and hand Democrats the Senate majority. The days ahead are make or break - we MUST rapidly expand our TV ad buys to keep up with the MILLIONS Shaheen and the Democrats are spending to defeat me. . I’m leaving it all on the field, and so is our team. But we need YOU with us if we’re going to surge across the finish line. The next 18 days will decide who controls the Senate - and victory in New Hampshire guarantees a Republican majority. . Corky Sent from my iPhone | | From : Corky Messner Sent : Wednesday, October 14, 2020 12:00 PM To : Corky Messner Subject : Everything could hinge on New Hampshire Friend - I asked my team to put together a list of our TOP supporters and I’m glad to see your name on the list. Supporters like you have made the difference so far, and it’s because of your efforts that we’re going to WIN on Election Day! Election Day is now just 20 DAYS away, and we need your help more than ever before to finish strong, defeat DC Jeanne Shaheen, and FLIP this seat! Every donation will be used to keep our TV ads running for the final 20 days of this campaign — and that’s crucial to our success. Winning New Hampshire would guarantee a Republican Senate majority — and I need you to help us get across the finish line. . We HAVE to win New Hampshire and keep the Dems from flipping the Senate! Thanks, Corky Messner id:2020-10-08-20:34:01:542t | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

body:
I know Senator Barrasso has been keeping you updated on all of the fundraising numbers from Q3, but now that all the campaigns have reported their hauls, we have to be frank with you.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cG36vA2LKAaQXDjaOto_ZQvjsk8MATO3ygfCjLMk0a3z59kiQsiQwk7OfvzXE0QMvhsE25iw92RW5IKPAYAxaazqhq_z1vevGwwXVD_PnEnITkiwPkihzo7kjZC57_bteKeuY51yMd3qoGo5oyliBYd413csj2mBQpniLApdeLaCtnF0BSnILxYtXZxiZf6YGOkeeJM3BP4yR2C32qsReGXPODruOr_7SJ6_CavpYNWgJUhb-QB6uiG3YXi2476szrNIZjHteE3GbFVPEfkQukOet3DTNzUz2ys_k4TtCKRLURJGdmFVYfg4zrvhePo78dKoKxonQCEMf75q81jTsGPx01sYo5_kYGnFadrXySDdejZBL5Q3P1u1dyZ82p5ucfKwxWWmDm9KDe3YfBh2Wz6M2AL0vw3Fi5kRGXmvxD8=&c=Df-IQ5gu3ZhiVTqIbN7f3c92F1HTQaRXoW0Ns6fJEJ8FdtYtZJkPeA==&ch=XwQsV3W-mOVPsohHjbKls3es8vKtmWDr9L_hUGu1tCPn5IkkDLU2Tw==)
I know Senator Barrasso has been keeping you updated on all of the fundraising numbers from Q3, but now that all the campaigns have reported their hauls, we have to be frank with you.

**We never thought it would get this bad.**

Chuck Schumer's class of radical, handpicked liberals raised over _**$312 MILLION to unseat Republicans and flip the Senate.**_

Joe Biden raised a record _**$383 MILLION to oust President Trump.**_

name: Susan Collins
subject: FAKE NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Fake News floating across the internet.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QK8EqUsnkyxXMt7LPEyozm80ZB-7alcxoo3A-AiIoFragHW_PowmXgOu_Q02MqFhpPZkvAOXK1Z4HIurXCEoi-uuSg2RN7vpkS06D8Ox52FZCACJbR8hFcruIZqrNWek-19m--k9ptFh3ohfLYIR9r3vIh80UB0RGKLdwRjayg-n_3GNr1xpBjbMU4vgfoTH8DLUR_McXmoYIs9F1lgV994nydC1yjRDjjscYIQVDCgL7vaLu-4H_NgS1DP85F7VAx-YrswDYfnZmTk_RFR-qycSHVf7fzGxH3ZK6K3v3daSiA-Xfz9ASrJWSu1NXP8AN2DLHUCmD38ixpqTedLFVx9y6L4qc3pF6R6YdJDkk-_9sC6Rtep5VRTWg_POxhp3gaD6oQs1UXiCNGn5owXlpQ==&c=zuuhQT-r5B9_d5ZJMtlT5ctnlzztC9FiCixoaeQMDrVkTTUGQ8bBvA==&ch=CKCx8t2C95elTWEgTeIENZ9LrCXHgHI0gfHQcx9qwi9ahzjBJCKvxQ==)
Friend,
Just when I think I've seen it all from the Far Left -- they have stooped to a new low.
Yesterday, in an attempt to defame me, supporters of my opponent began tweeting quotes and attributing them to me when I have never spoken those words. And in true liberal fashion, these tweets started gaining traction with thousands of retweets amongst Sara Gideon's liberal supporters.
_**Friend, this is beyond FAKE NEWS, it 's SLANDER. **_
There seem to be no repercussions for the amount of lies and fake headlines that are swirling around both Maine and our nation. But here's the BEST response -> we can WIN on November 3rd and put to rest their false accusations and utter lies.
Right now this race in Maine is in a statistical tie, which has the Far Left panicked that they are stooping to new lows.
Won't you please help me fight back and WIN in 3 weeks? That would be the best way to stand up to these trolls!
[HELP SUSAN FIGHT BACK! DONATE NOW >> ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QK8EqUsnkyxXMt7LPEyozm80ZB-7alcxoo3A-AiIoFragHW_PowmXgOu_Q02MqFhpPZkvAOXK1Z4HIurXCEoi-uuSg2RN7vpkS06D8Ox52FZCACJbR8hFcruIZqrNWek-19m--k9ptFh3ohfLYIR9r3vIh80UB0RGKLdwRjayg-n_3GNr1xpBjbMU4vgfoTH8DLUR_McXmoYIs9F1lgV994nydC1yjRDjjscYIQVDCgL7vaLu-4H_NgS1DP85F7VAx-YrswDYfnZmTk_RFR-qycSHVf7fzGxH3ZK6K3v3daSiA-Xfz9ASrJWSu1NXP8AN2DLHUCmD38ixpqTedLFVx9y6L4qc3pF6R6YdJDkk-_9sC6Rtep5VRTWg_POxhp3gaD6oQs1UXiCNGn5owXlpQ==&c=zuuhQT-r5B9_d5ZJMtlT5ctnlzztC9FiCixoaeQMDrVkTTUGQ8bBvA==&ch=CKCx8t2C95elTWEgTeIENZ9LrCXHgHI0gfHQcx9qwi9ahzjBJCKvxQ==)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Why I'm coming to you now, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
In 18 days, Virginians will face a decision...
|
---

| | Derek,

**There 's a lot on the ballot this year.**

Virginians are faced with the choice to protect the progress we've made in the Commonwealth and continue to move our country forward, or allow Republicans to drag us backward. The way I see it, we just can't afford to lose the strides we've made over the last few years to make Virginia more equitable for everyone.

Look, the election is just 18 days away on November 3rd. We've got a lot of work left to do and we're in the homestretch. We need all hands on deck to elect folks like Dr. Cameron Webb in VA-05, and protect our great freshman representatives in districts like VA-07 and VA-02.

That's why I'm turning to you, Derek. We have the power to keep Virginia blue and keep our Commonwealth -- and our country -- moving forward. But we're counting on folks like you.

**[Will you split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Virginia (DPVA)?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da28/53d9897e/5557768e/1c88f66f/951266655/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvabundle?refcode=20201016_f_1_nd__867__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We're in crunch time now, and every dollar makes a difference toward electing Democrats up and down the ballot. I'm not just saying that: your donations help us keep ads on the air, support voter outreach, and pay for digital ads in every corner of the Commonwealth. When you make a donation, you're investing in the future you want to see for Virginia.

If you believe, as I do, that the best days for the Commonwealth and for our country lay in front of us, please consider chipping in to support me and your Democratic Party here in Virginia. **[If you can, please consider supporting Virginia Democrats.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da28/53d9897e/5557768e/1c88f66e/951266655/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvabundle?refcode=20201016_f_1_nd__867__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support! Let's bring this home.

clean_body: In 18 days, Virginians will face a decision... | | | Derek, There 's a lot on the ballot this year. Virginians are faced with the choice to protect the progress we've made in the Commonwealth and continue to move our country forward, or allow Republicans to drag us backward. The way I see it, we just can't afford to lose the strides we've made over the last few years to make Virginia more equitable for everyone. Look, the election is just 18 days away on November 3rd. We've got a lot of work left to do and we're in the homestretch. We need all hands on deck to elect folks like Dr. Cameron Webb in VA-05, and protect our great freshman representatives in districts like VA-07 and VA-02. That's why I'm turning to you, Derek. We have the power to keep Virginia blue and keep our Commonwealth -- and our country -- moving forward. But we're counting on folks like you. "" We're in crunch time now, and every dollar makes a difference toward electing Democrats up and down the ballot. I'm not just saying that: your donations help us keep ads on the air, support voter outreach, and pay for digital ads in every corner of the Commonwealth. What's concerning is that Twitter and Facebook banned users from sharing the story. Twitter even locked the account of the New York Post, one of the largest news organizations in the country!

name: Pam's iPhone
subject: We need to close the gap.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
Derek,
With just 18 days to go until November 3rd, we know that New Hampshire is in play in all of our major races - **but we're currently being outspent by out-of-state groups **who want to impose their values on New Hampshire.
I know a lot of people have asked you for a contribution this election, but **dollar-for-dollar New Hampshire is the best investment you can make this election cycle.** When so many of our target races could be decided by just a handful of votes - _and I truly mean just a handful of votes_ - [**_that makes your donation to support New Hampshire Republicans so much more valuable._**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzMzA0NjgxMjI3MzU5ODg5JmM9YTBwMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzIzNDY5NDUmZD1yNnU2eDVz.EpJuj2quZxA4Nqk71tg0QkcwNNQFi4oH1VtEzwnfcMI)
Many emails will try to push you with a special match rate or ability to increase your impact, but I can genuinely tell you that [**_the 5 dollars that you donate to the New Hampshire Republican Party will do so much more to impact the 2020 election than any other political donation you make this cycle._**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzMzA0NjgxMjI3MzU5ODg5JmM9YTBwMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzIzNDY5NDgmZD1kM24zejBq.PKq0JLE4hPJiW7ux1ZN5TCQEs7Iz63OIVGpNkegQocI)
In 2016, **President Trump** lost New Hampshire by just _2,736 votes_. Even closer than that razor thin margin was **State Senator Harold French** 's race, when he defeated a well entrenched Democrat incumbent by just 17 votes.
**That's not 17 percentage points - that represents the 17 New Hampshire voters who determined his crucial win in 2016. **
In 2018 we lost 35 New Hampshire House seats by margins under 100 votes - and we are roughly that many seats away from flipping the New Hampshire House of Representatives this year and placing it in Republican control.
From President Trump on down through our state legislative and county candidates, New Hampshire Republicans need a strong & united New Hampshire Republican Party to help close the gap and deliver victory on November 3rd. I know we can do it by getting everyone on board, but [**_our chances greatly increase if we could count on your support today._**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzMzA0NjgxMjI3MzU5ODg5JmM9YTBwMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzIzNDY5NTEmZD11NXowbjRr.AnNOm3fbd7WbV6qqrMf6vy4HN8O1tqmigzuPH2oSnv4)
A lot of candidates and organizations have asked a lot of you this election cycle, but that just highlights how important it is that we succeed and win on November 3rd. _**[Your donation to the NHGOP today will go directly to electing Republicans up and down the ballot in a critical swing state that the nation's eyes are all on.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzMzA0NjgxMjI3MzU5ODg5JmM9YTBwMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzIzNDY5NTQmZD15M3o2aTd6.4Qu-wJOur6ckdHKvhq3rLNB7wK3rpl6sqCCGh97P3uc)**_
Yours in Victory,
Pamela Tucker
NHGOP Vice Chair
_Sent from my iPhone_
_P.S. Your donation to the New Hampshire GOP is critical to preserving New Hampshire as a beacon for Republicanism in the Northeast while protecting our New Hampshire Advantage.[_**Please donate today - if you've already donated via WinRed, you can donate easily and securely with one click here.**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzMzA0NjgxMjI3MzU5ODg5JmM9YTBwMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzIzNDY5NTcmZD14Mmc0aTJn.SyYPmeaDoGqhUhAGRAD9gLCbx-rYn9uao7o4FBhRzTo) _

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
There's so much at stake -- and time is running out.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8192%2E868730%2EU9akFa) Friend, Our mid-month deadline is at midnight tonight. You know what's at stake: Our opponent is on the air with a misleading ad even while he continues to sow right-wing extremist ideas. He's done that since he launched his campaign -- this ad should fool no one. But voters are voting right now, and we have to reach them with the truth: Washington state needs strong, decisive leadership, not a mini-Donald Trump. If we don't get the facts out, that might be who we get. **Before tonight's FINAL mid-month deadline, we need to hit our $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal to keep our ads on the air and reach as many Washington voters as possible:[Will you donate $5 or more right now, with so much on the line?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12974?t=4&akid=8192%2E868730%2EU9akFa)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12975?t=5&akid=8192%2E868730%2EU9akFa)

subject: The insult and injury of Jackie's hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
In order to defeat COVID-19, we need to defeat Jackie. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=35c0cd4c6c&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c6d47cb89a&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

What Jackie says and what Jackie does are two different things. Last weekend, Jackie boastfully posted pictures of herself at a Goshen rally wearing no mask, shaking hands and hugging vulnerable populations of people while practicing no social distancing. All this, while the number of COVID-19 cases in Indiana is at an all time high.

Jackie then turns around after receiving a groundswell of backlash and tweets out that she is committed to defeating coronavirus and keeping America healthy. [Jackie’s hypocrisy is insulting, reckless, and injurious.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1e625ca656&e=5886ca081d) It is a dereliction of duty for a sitting congressperson.
Jackie is not truthful and demonstrates she is incapable of leadership.
[In order to defeat COVID-19, we need to defeat Jackie.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1327adc7f5&e=5886ca081d)
**We need a representative who doesn’t deny science**. Jackie has jeopardized the health of her constituents. Instead of using science to defeat COVID-19, Jackie uses China as a scapegoat.

**We need a representative who leads by example.** Jackie’s dereliction of duty by not following CDC guidelines of wearing a mask and practicing social distancing is inexcusable.

**We need a representative who will protect those with pre-existing conditions.** Jackie has voted repeatedly to gut protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions, and Jackie has voted for a lawsuit to remove healthcare during a pandemic.
**[Call out Jackie’s hypocrisy.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=87cf338628&e=5886ca081d)**

---

name: Bill Olson
subject: They are unhinged
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

Hi Peter,

It's insane how much the Dems have gone crazy over Judge Amy Coney Barrett being nominated to the Supreme Court- but we will stop Nancy Pelosi and the Dems from derailing her nomination!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ
!

What the far Left did to Justice Kavanaugh, assassinating the character of that good and decent man, was criminal and should have been prosecuted.

What they are doing to Judge Barrett is arguably worse!

Now understand: Judge Barrett's intellect and credentials are impeccable. I am thoroughly enjoying watching her school all of the liberal political hacks on the Judicial Committee.

The defining moment came when she was asked to show her notes for the hearing:

When Judge Amy Coney Barrett displayed that she was not using notes during Tuesday's Supreme Court confirmation hearing, the moment became just one of a few to go viral.

Conservatives applauded Barrett, calling her "THAT smart", but the moment also brought forth a wave of memes from both sides of the political aisle.

When Barrett cited various judges, cases, and laws as she discussed her career and how she would rule on the Supreme Court during the second day of her confirmation hearings, she did it all from memory.

As Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, started to question Barrett, he asked her to hold up the notebook sitting in front of her, noting most senators had multiple books and notebooks to reference.

That's right- Judge Barrett really IS that bright. She'll do a wonderful job on the Supreme Court.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

But then came the extremist Senator from Hawaii, "Crazy Mazie" Hirono.

She represents Hawaii, which is all but a single-party state. Look, she’s an attack dog. She says whatever the party feeds her, albeit she doesn’t do it well. In fact, she’s quite a disaster scene. Yet, there is one question that she says will be asked of all nominees to our courts, and that is if they ever committed sexual assault or harassment in their history. It’s a total pandering move. And you look abjectly stupid when you ask someone, like Judge Amy Coney Barrett, if she was ever accused of such behavior.

Then again, it’s Mazie. And yes, she did ask Judge Barrett if she raped anyone upon becoming a legal adult.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

If asking a Catholic mother of seven is somehow the "new normal", that's a good reason not to elect another Democrat ever again.

If Nancy Pelosi's threatening to pack the court if a Republican nominee goes through is the "new normal", that's a good reason to take the gavel out of her hands!

Are you a patriot like me, who just wants NORMAL normal? Then I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

Trump needs Florida, and Florida is in play. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade, but is currently held by Pelosi sycophant Darren Soto.

If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. It's a must-win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the nutty liberals!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ
today? We need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ipoTzSgQ1F6OuRU&b=I5u0hCWanJ6N4oQn3En4qQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Big Tech is becoming Big Brother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Big Tech is out of control.

On Wednesday, Facebook and Twitter censored user accounts, posts and content related to a _New York Post_ article about Joe Biden.

They did that 20 days before the biggest election in our lifetimes. _**Enough is enough. We need to take action!**_
[_**STAND UP TO BIG TECH >>> ADD YOUR NAME**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015f_KnqkokaXyF5B_Zx_c-FRnJU_FePfdzFoPwzXzTzdKqWqOe-lDzhIzPd2D6zn0yCiYC0CDB3Z2uSw0G1_pN7CBcy-zcj_UlXTaSw5tAA5CLBQfSPaR03tXtCbwCiWqWFybx7FggMfkNjN5HbFNjQrU7fmWR5z1g25tK4zjgjRt0a706l6JM7QJT_xB92dylpxcgCdflK7jolD2FMxw_wmTvD9G3TdsaCXOZFBWLkfElhw7nk8aahQxtaQAGCTkCKyfhiF4EHZ9ja6eIbRWm43d6ol_s0k94BUc3mtzHN4HMFVYhF7fzShkRpsMRIH6rHc4RXxRHzEud-GBYKW9Dcyk52ykioWQ0P5d2gHaKcLd70D2tv0VEZ_cPUHT6JwrrTJ2Tv5SNe41Q-eOX_yQde9LjPsfLbzBLQMYSw2-YDMOPPVVjlJ5rjB-zZZ45yf3VTwJ36Fsjpg=&c=dEbT1dtEUGvE_zrWtzU-6eYy7JKnECz59SEsN1KuP1IsBJUMExTFog==&ch=orPX2gMUMeNlEp0K9hnvbYMYYJtj_x-Y8gqo_PHJfV2afT5KPYmWyA==)
I saw this coming in June, Friend. I knew that if the Trump Administration did not clarify Section 230, it could be abused like we saw this week. I'm glad the Administration is now taking the necessary steps to examine this issue, but I worry irreparable damage has already been done. We can't allow this to happen again. Big Tech is abusing their positions and we can't allow it to continue any further.

**But there 's more.**

We need a Senate Majority that will rein in Section 230 -- not one led by Democrats who are beholden to the liberal elites in Silicon Valley, but a Conservative Senate that puts YOUR interests above Big Tech. That's why this is the most important election of our lives. Our privacy, our liberty and the future of our nation are all on the ballot in November. That's why it's so crucial we keep our Senate Majority. [**Can you pitch in right now to support Senators who are willing to stand up to Big Tech?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015f_KnqkokaXyF5B_Zx_c-FRnJU_FePfdzFoPwzXzTzdKqWqOe-lDzhIzPd2D6zn0yCiYC0CDB3Z2uSw0G1_pN7CBcy-zcj_UlXTaSw5tAA5CLBQfSPaR03tXtCbwCiWqWFybx7FggMfkNjN5HbFNjQrU7fmWR5z1g25tK4zjgjRt0a706l6JM7QJT_xB92dylpxcgCdflK7jolD2FMxw_wmTvD9G3TdsaCXOZFBWLkfElhw7nk8aahQxtaQAGCTkCKyfhiF4EHZ9ja6eIbRWm43d6ol_s0k94BUc3mtzHN4HMFVYhF7fzShkRpsMRIH6rHc4RXxRHzEud-GBYKW9Dcyk52ykioWQ0P5d2gHaKcLd70D2tv0VEZ_cPUHT6JwrrTJ2Tv5SNe41Q-eOX_yQde9LjPsfLbzBLQMYSw2-YDMOPPVVjlJ5rjB-zZZ45yf3VTwJ36Fsjpg=&c=dEbT1dtEUGvE_zrWtzU-6eYy7JKnECz59SEsN1KuP1IsBJUMExTFog==&ch=orPX2gMUMeNlEp0K9hnvbYMYYJtj_x-Y8gqo_PHJfV2afT5KPYmWyA==)

clean_body: Big Tech is out of control. On Wednesday, Facebook and Twitter censored user accounts, posts and content related to a New York Post article about Joe Biden. They did that 20 days before the biggest election in our lifetimes. Enough is enough. We need to take action! == I saw this coming in June, Friend. I knew that if the Trump Administration did not clarify Section 230, it could be abused like we saw this week. I'm glad the Administration is now taking the necessary steps to examine this issue, but I worry irreparable damage has already been done. We can't allow this to happen again. Big Tech is abusing their positions and we can't allow it to continue any further. But there 's more. We need a Senate Majority that will rein in Section 230 -- not one led by Democrats who are beholden to the liberal elites in Silicon Valley, but a Conservative Senate that puts YOUR interests above Big Tech. That's why this is the most important election of our lives. Our privacy, our liberty and the future of our nation are all on the ballot in November. That's why it's so crucial we keep our Senate Majority. == == Facebook, Twitter and the rest think they can control the election on the internet and in Congress. And they will ... if Democrats take control of the Senate. I need your help to make sure Facebook, Twitter, and the Democrats do not silence us online or in the halls of Congress. subject: Let's set the record straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20400524/256843502/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRmNTA3My1lOTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ketSFHMwNDtlQ1l_dtjHhMYwBjgj5ssK1xpFJ5WaGG8=&emci=b03dc9a5-d50f-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=cfdf5073-e90f-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=8780864)
Friend,

My opponent released an attack ad this week comparing us to Donald Trump and accusing us of using “Trump tactics.”

**_Here's what we're not going to do:_** Attack her back using false claims and accusations.

**_Here's what we are going to do:_** Talk about reality. The truth. Where I stand as your candidate and about the campaign that we've built, together.

Let's get one thing straight -- I have _nothing_ in common with the President of the United States.

Donald Trump has done nothing but protect big corporations and the top 1%, helping the rich get richer while the poor stay poor. He is a misogynistic, homophobic, racist individual who uses his platform to advance an agenda of hatred and divisiveness.

But me? I am a proud, first generation Mexican-American with humbling life experience. From growing up with immigrant parents and adapting to a completely new way of life here, it's a unique experience with life-changing moments -- an experience that immigrant families face across the entire country.

Donald Trump doesn't know what that's like. My opponent? She doesn't know what it's like either.

I didn't grow up wealthy. I wasn't born into a rich family. I worked multiple jobs from the time I was in high school to put food on the table and afford my tuition at San Diego State University. Donald Trump, however, was privileged enough to attend an Ivy League and was “gifted” $1 million to start his own business. My opponent was also fortunate enough to attend an Ivy League school, lives off the passive income generated by her family's wealth, and is claiming the same real estate tax write-offs that let Donald Trump only pay $750 in taxes.

But guess what? I wouldn't change a thing. I wouldn't change anything about my life experiences because then I wouldn't be where I'm at right now -- running to be your Congresswoman in CA-53.

If things were different, I wouldn't know the struggles of so many working-class people who get manipulated by the millionaires and billionaires of this country. Who wonder where the next meal may come from, or if their parents will come home from work or be taken by the border patrol -- _I've been there._ But people who've known money their entire lives? **Once again, they don't know what it's like.**

But _still_ , I wouldn't change a thing.

Today, I'm proud to be running for CA-53 and set to be the first LGBTQ+ Latina in Congress. Although I'm an unconventional candidate, unconventional is what we need -- not more politicians who have only come to Congress to play partisan politics.

**I'm different, and I'm here to represent you and only you.**

clean_body: | Friend, My opponent released an attack ad this week comparing us to Donald Trump and accusing us of using “Trump tactics.” Here's what we're not going to do: Attack her back using false claims and accusations. Here's what we are going to do: Talk about reality. The truth. Where I stand as your candidate and about the campaign that we've built, together. Let's get one thing straight -- I have nothing in common with the President of the United States. Donald Trump has done nothing but protect big corporations and the top 1%, helping the rich get richer while the poor stay poor. He is a misogynistic, homophobic, racist individual who uses his platform to advance an agenda of hatred and divisiveness. But me? I am a proud, first generation Mexican-American with humbling life experience. From growing up with immigrant parents and adapting to a completely new way of life here, it's a unique experience with life-changing moments -- an experience that immigrant families face across the entire country. Donald Trump doesn't know what that's like. My opponent? She doesn't know what it's like either. I didn't grow up wealthy. I wasn't born into a rich family. I worked multiple jobs from the time I was in high school to put food on the table and afford my tuition at San Diego State University. Donald Trump, however, was privileged enough to attend an Ivy League and was “gifted” $1 million to start his own business. My opponent was also fortunate enough to attend an Ivy League school, lives off the passive income generated by her family's wealth, and is claiming the same real estate tax write-offs that let Donald Trump only pay $750 in taxes. But guess what? I wouldn't change a thing. I wouldn't change anything about my life experiences because then I wouldn't be where I'm at right now -- running to be your Congresswoman in CA-53. If things were different, I wouldn't know the struggles of so many working-class people who get manipulated by the millionaires and billionaires of this country. Who wonder where the next meal may come from, or if their parents will come home from work or be taken by the border patrol -- I've been there. But people who've known money their entire lives? Once again, they don't know what it's like. But still , I wouldn't change a thing. Today, I'm proud to be running for CA-53 and set to be the first LGBTQ+ Latina in Congress. Although I'm an unconventional candidate, unconventional is what we need -- not more politicians who have only come to Congress to play partisan politics. I'm different, and I'm here to represent you and only you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Like First Lady Michelle Obama once said, “When they go low, we go high.” With love, Georgette Gómez = | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party. Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please =. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Georgette! Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Peter,

Right now, Democrats are beating us in the "fundraising game."

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d44ec9746d8441429ed4e66941a495e0&_e=PaJrgdprGO0kzQACvSFLRfaPHV4W51mQqt5dm1euhhxbcuczHIZwc73Zsc3kuD8BB2aBluYHzvWnoKAuQGg9F-skkxwJacsV6Mro2sdrci3zxVVQxS_l8bX3itw0VMLzPZOJHVGS_OgLUMKB36nKivcjWVfqkSV0azfJay6nTaxnc_isHSu4ntWJLZGIrlIdvfv_iTaX7sJ1yzaWoPv50ByVlmlwhf0fpSdks8pCHNpSYGqakgoxWuak0n2GJHFkdhIOwRRxBwoODFOEmslDpZmu-fsBXtzHUct5-DoFlNI-o6ZS28xd9Gpo5e-xs2D69hCRsg9idHbvWggwtDWwAfMoRuddCYHp6PCLpc83Ih0B9MAqWHq9Po2VCZ0ystrY)

name: Team Kat
subject: A Champion for Law Enforcement
body:
Fighting for our safety
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00148FtvkST9PPH0VHaj_mP_eeWBiNArlxyApMVIWhGa8KuDr9DaMqgEfSVgXGFSW0O_pu9095bfcxazUYZyyCriYG0-71hP08MYIgkbtcA9MBLB15-LvrXbrlAqzR-nLVJEy5x96oXDA0AyE7W6XjDjX38TN0e8ubgHJKZr6OJwpcAdLq4okSTptc97vLatwmtbxUgHq1uyfM=&c=iyShT1F4T30FHqZ9MQo1zZayY_RLH_QcQXAVjN1VjosBWkJiVjq10w==&ch=933Y79zZb9RxSUpgaZ-YeqIKiLDry14ERo0oq5XLr_hXoI6j1HQMrA==)
---
| Patriot,
With our brave men and women in uniform facing cuts across our country, they need our support now more than ever.
Our police, firefighters, EMTs, and public defenders across the country risk their lives every day to keep all of us safe. Without them, our communities would face insecurity and high crime.
The solution is not to defund the police - it is to BACK THE BLUE and show all the brave men and women of the Thin Blue Line that we stand with them!
No one understands this more than Kat. Her priority is to keep our communities safe, our borders secure, and our businesses growing. Kat is an advocate for safety and security and she stands with our officers.
That is why she has been endorsed by law enforcement across the state and the district!
---

clean_body: Fighting for our safety | | | | | | == | Patriot, With our brave men and women in uniform facing cuts across our country, they need our support now more than ever. Our police, firefighters, EMTs, and public defenders across the country risk their lives every day to keep all of us safe. Without them, our communities would face insecurity and high crime. The solution is not to defund the police - it is to BACK THE BLUE and show all the brave men and women of the Thin Blue Line that we stand with them! No one understands this more than Kat. Her priority is to keep our communities safe, our borders secure, and our businesses growing. Kat is an advocate for safety and security and she stands with our officers. That is why she has been endorsed by law enforcement across the state and the district! | == | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, Team Kat | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

We must end the liberal media's interference in our free elections.
| Friend,

clean_body: We must end the liberal media's interference in our free elections. | Friend, Both President Trump's campaign account and mine have been locked by Twitter. The media 's attempts to influence this election MUST end. But while politicians talk, as an Air Force veteran, I take action, so I've filed a complaint with the Federal Election Commission. I'm taking Twitter to court for failing to report an in-kind contribution to my opponent, Democrat Charlie Crist's campaign. == == == Thank you, == Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran Official Republican Nominee for Congress (FL-13) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From:Anna Paulina Luna Sent: Thurs, Oct 15, 2020 Subject: RE: Complaint filed with the FEC == Friend, We hear conservatives talk a lot about liberal bias and censorship online. But as an Air Force veteran, I don't just talk, I take action. That's why I just filed a complaint with the Federal Election Commission against Twitter for failing to report an in-kind contribution to Charlie Crist's campaign by verifying his account but not mine. == All gifts 3x-matched for 25 minutes. == == ✅ I won the official Republican nomination to take on Charlie Crist. ✅ I have consistently outraised Charlie Crist. ✅ And I serve in the United States Air Force. But Twitter doesn 't believe that I'm on an equal footing with Democrat Charlie Crist.** This is the kind of bias that infuriates conservatives. Media platforms love to pretend they're neutral all while they're tipping the scale in favor of their preferred candidates. I'm not going to stand for it -- and neither should you. Join me in my fight today. == Thank you, == Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran Official Republican Nominee for Congress (FL-13) PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. | | ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS | PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - reasons you might be a Hoosier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Hoosiers are some of the greatest people on the planet — we’re hard-working, resilient, and we treat our neighbors like family. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=37c892f3acbe493ba5a7fda265188e5c&_e=Geroxo5V1Acti-GW_kTwlqFIhwkpGhnH2KPo5-6e33qJC2SQndVMGBwuGwAp_XGVn4dAhDzPopb_Cg_XX4_28c6rTt50msYWxkcNpZLXnFfJ5o9Z8aDPf_7sAg0JeqkdTKFZLgf_oZTm6s56GOrMg4IdC1pVKBwa0RnC39PLJI-PAwpzkecQgUXZvJLkuCvnhWGt0FZwDJIPQq88um9ODxU5ubQI4Lk-p3A41inU--8TmXXAHy881suuBRZ--bqxZyPeOUbPBcsb7WkXi9HM6CVq3II0x80EQAGRySlMdD8z_DgYQc9K04mIP-RcRIwa4nHImT6nW1ypl1gAexfNBJPk_0pcT_LbsqmW4rXCVKMmH5d9aEgx7fZOC03qLCBLYcQt_cuBrO2lMHiMJ1yVAT1ABa8klDAlALI-KuM9wo7HZw6b3SVi3zC8lcY6j53Yi_2E6GkZh69bqqPVV4uGSk4uGqccd9wyVqtLVtWSHJ4%3D) Friends, Hoosiers are some of the greatest people on the planet — **we’re hard-working, resilient, and we treat our neighbors like family. **
**Those uniquely Hoosier traits have been on full display as we navigate through the pandemic, together. **
We’ll be honest — there are a lot of telltale signs that you might be a Hoosier. From the paint job on your barn to the sports memories you just can’t let go, there are so many signals that showcase our Hoosier pride.
We wanted to have a little fun with this week’s list, so we pulled together ten reasons why you might just be a true Hoosier.
Check it out below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=37c892f3acbe493ba5a7fda265188e5c&_e=Geroxo5V1Acti-GW_kTwlqFIhwkpGhnH2KPo5-6e33qJC2SQndVMGBwuGwAp_XGVn4dAhDzPopb_Cg_XX4_28c6rTt50msYWxkcNpZLXnFfJ5o9Z8aDPf_7sAg0JeqkdTKFZLgf_oZTm6s56GOrMg4IdC1pVKBwa0RnC39PLJI-PAwpzkecQgUXZvJLkuCvnhWGt0FZwDJIPQq88um9ODxU5ubQI4Lk-p3A41inU--8TmXXAHy881suuBRZ--bqxZyPeOUbPBcsb7WkXi9HM6OKN2cZVWysDgM1yeLgstkZlpldRg4AqRmQ6NjKEKMgU4KvM3LbCBR03myxMjzrbX2Aw0d7eW_Gn3aM8Rb8TZ0cZR2eLihEeu7bwsk3VOpMJ9Sku2fcKNg1672EL2HSXzU6yMa2s668LnktA75gON8AiO9gU1w9DlkhC1op1bZ_mn_q9CtnYwiRiIz6f6f7CasQZrA1R5jK8njErEgguHLI%3D)
* **If your mailbox, barn or body has your favorite driver’s number on it...**
* **If you know what a Full Pull is...**
* **If you know what the Snake Pit is...**
* **If you still talk about Keith Smart (or Christian Watford) hitting the buzzer-beater...**
* **If you've been on the Tenderloin Trail...**
* **If you’ve visited Brazil, Mexico, Paris, and London without leaving the state...**
* **If you consider County Fair Season as a fifth season**
* **If you've ever made a lantern by putting fireflies in a Ball jar...**
* **If you've experienced Gnaw Bone & Hope in one day...**
* **If you've wondered if the sweet corn will be knee-high by the 4th of July...**
* **If you know North Vernon is in the south and South Bend is in the north...**

Did we miss a telltale sign that you might be a Hoosier? Let us know! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=37c892f3acbe493ba5a7fda265188e5c&_e=Geroxo5V1Acti-GW_kTwlqFIhwkpGhnH2KPo5-6e33qJC2SQndVMGBwuGwAp_XGVn4dAhDzPopb_Cg_XX4_28c6rTt50msYWxkcNpZLXnFfJ5o9Z8aDPf_7sAg0JeqkdTKFZLgf_oZTm6s56GOrMg4IdC1pVKBwa0RnC39PLJI-PAwpzkecQgUXZvJLkuCvnhWGt0FZwDJIPQq88um9ODxU5ubQI4Lk-p3A41inU--8TmXXAHy881suuBRZ--bqxZyPeOUbPBcsb7WkXi9HM6PBb4So9XN5cRYA_dNYIpDu4RvKfcAzc12-CSzPTQJE_g-2BW-D3cm6UKLyz6ZoKV69Zt6GD95SDj4bcEBGj7ajqold54pWEGUSkl-QuhE4maa4NUK5nIzngyNmQ2CIWfbZkExceJfRzPELkML1KxKyvOxGHSVVPSWTGDI2qx7WuRnZs4wCtPcWEZsVSII7207lVQ7F3w60mC01bP5HaqIM%3D) Thanks for reading,
Holcomb Crew | |

body:

It’s been a wild ride on social media the past few days, as Big Tech appears to be doing everything they can to run cover for Joe Biden’s presidential campaign. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkwLTZiMTI1NzhjOTM4ZDRkMzc4OTk5MjZjYzUxYzgyNjE4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%&K=rNV8TJf5tjkwV6LMuP1SkQ)** | |
---
The NBC “town hall” with President Trump turned out not be a town hall, after all. Instead it was an outright ambush. After the Commission on Presidential Debates decided to make the second debate a “virtual debate,” President Trump rightfully declined. Instead he decided to take his message directly to the American people. So, in that spirit, he reached a deal with NBC that would allow him to actually talk with the American people live and answer the important questions they had... or so we all thought. What NBC had in store was anything but a discussion with actual voters about issues that matter. Instead, NBC allowed Democratic pundit Savannah Guthrie to attack the President for an hour straight on national television. Of course, as he always does, the President handled this well — but, in an event that was supposed to be about the President talking with the people, he was allowed to answer less than 10 questions from the town hall attendees. Instead of helping to forward voter education, the mainstream media chose to help forward the DNC’s narrative — in other words, nothing new.
|

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkwLTZiMTI1NzhjOTM4ZDRkMzc4OTk5MjZjYzUxYzgyNjE4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2FteS1jb25leS1iYXJyZXR0LWZsaXBzLXNjcmlwdC11c2VzLXJ1dGgtYmFkZXItZ2luc2J1cmdzLXdvcmRzLXNpbGVuY2UtZGVtcy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXRwcG50ayZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGF0cmlvdC1wcm9qZWN0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAtMTAtMTYmbWlkPTQyODI3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=quMQps3kNnfVYeSNSwbIDA)

**[Amy Coney Barrett Flips Script, Uses Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s Words To Silence Dems](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkwLTZiMTI1NzhjOTM4ZDRkMzc4OTk5MjZjYzUxYzgyNjE4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2FteS1jb25leS1iYXJyZXR0LWZsaXBzLXNjcmlwdC11c2VzLXJ1dGgtYmFkZXItZ2luc2J1cmdzLXdvcmRzLXNpbGVuY2UtZGVtcy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXRwcG50ayZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGF0cmlvdC1wcm9qZWN0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAtMTAtMTYmbWlkPTQyODI3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=3e7XmleaclnXFuCyC_GvNA)**

This week the Senate Judiciary Committee took the first steps towards confirming President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett.

Democrats launched a variety of attacks against her with topics ranging from the dismantling of Obamacare to the core tenets of her faith. Many tried and failed to make the case that she should not be confirmed.

Judge Barrett stood strong and resolute in the face of the Democrats’ attacks, deploying the patience and fortitude only a seasoned jurist and mother of seven can demonstrate.

No attacks against her held any weight and at the end of the day the minds of many Senators remained unchanged one way or another. As it appeared from the start, this will be a vote strictly along party lines -- which is why, now more than ever, it is vital that you utilize our **[Confirm ACB Hub page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkwLTZiMTI1NzhjOTM4ZDRkMzc4OTk5MjZjYzUxYzgyNjE4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4MjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=F3tQVxzlcF8_4_etMrivGg)**. There is a petition, a toolkit, and sample social media that you can use to help get Amy Coney Barrett confirmed. So, make your voice heard, tell the Senate to vote to CONFIRM Judge Amy Coney Barrett without delay.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkwLTZiMTI1NzhjOTM4ZDRkMzc4OTk5MjZjYzUxYzgyNjE4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4MjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=C1BDoHNg1OhP1DqPXdxMqg)

Our own Jenny Beth Martin was on the frontlines rallying at the U.S. Capitol to make sure your voice was heard! In-person action combined with the support many of you were able to give from homes across America are the keys to getting Judge Barrett confirmed.

Our message, together, is clear:

clean_body: It’s been a wild ride on social media the past few days, as Big Tech appears to be doing everything they can to run cover for Joe Biden’s presidential campaign. | | The NBC “town hall” with President Trump turned out not be a town hall, after all. Instead it was an outright ambush. After the Commission on Presidential Debates decided to make the second debate a “virtual debate,” President Trump rightfully declined. Instead he decided to take his message directly to the American people. So, in that spirit, he reached a deal with NBC that would allow him to actually talk with the American people live and answer the important questions they had... or so we all thought. What NBC had in store was anything but a discussion with actual voters about issues that matter. Instead, NBC allowed Democratic pundit Savannah Guthrie to attack the President for an hour straight on national television. Of course, as he always does, the President handled this well — but, in an event that was supposed to be about the President talking with the people, he was allowed to answer less than 10 questions from the town hall attendees. Instead of helping to forward voter education, the mainstream media chose to help forward the DNC’s narrative — in other words, nothing new. | Judge Amy Coney Barrett brilliantly used the words of late associate Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg while keeping Democrats at arm’s length during Tuesday’s confirmation hearing. | This week the Senate Judiciary Committee took the first steps towards confirming President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett. Democrats launched a variety of attacks against her with topics ranging from the dismantling of Obamacare to the core tenets of her faith. Many tried and failed to make the case that she should not be confirmed. Judge Barrett stood strong and resolute in the face of the Democrats’ attacks, deploying the patience and fortitude only a seasoned jurist and mother of seven can demonstrate. No attacks against her held any weight and at the end of the day the minds of many Senators remained unchanged one way or another. As it appeared from the start, this will be a vote strictly along party lines -- which is why, now more than ever, it is vital that you utilize our . There is a petition, a toolkit, and sample social media that you can use to help get Amy Coney Barrett confirmed. So, make your voice heard, tell the Senate to vote to CONFIRM Judge Amy Coney Barrett without delay. | For Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett, a blank notepad said it all. | Our own Jenny Beth Martin was on the frontlines rallying at the U.S. Capitol to make sure your voice was heard! In-person action combined with the support many of you were able to give from homes across America are the keys to getting Judge Barrett confirmed. Our message, together, is clear: Jenny Beth Martin, the Honorary Chairman of Tea Party Patriots Action, helped organize a rally Monday in support of the nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the U.S. Supreme Court. | In case you missed it, this week Big Tech engaged in major, blatant election interference. Major Silicon Valley tech companies rallied around the Biden campaign and colluded to censor a bombshell story that alleged massive Biden family corruption. , telling you what Big Tech doesn’t want you to hear. | On most nights, Fox News’ Tucker Carlson speaks out on the concerns of conservative Americans outraged at the paths leftists aim to be taking the country. | Twitter briefly locked the Trump campaign out of its official account on Thursday as part of its scorched earth crusade against a bombshell New York Post report about Joe and Hunter Biden. | |

body:

Peter, Did you see your invitation from the team? I'm hosting a meet and greet tomorrow in Newington and I'd love to see you there. Come by Seacoast Cars & Coffee, I'll be there from 1:30 PM to 3:30 PM talking with Granite Staters. [**Details are included here**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/736d7fca6d828142/9cc78c4b6e61a179c3d6b838967d376c/33153). Attendance is free, but reserving your spot is required. I look forward to seeing you there! \- Corky

_*Masks required and social distancing enforced*_ | |

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8ae/77d4c309/22085896/2635a41e/2628116369/VEsEBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8ae/77d4c309/22085896/2635a419/2628116369/VEsEBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8ae/77d4c309/22085896/2635a418/2628116369/VEsEAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

Friend, Unlike Abigail Spanberger’s campaign, our campaign wasn’t built by out-of-state millionaires and their radical agenda. Our campaign is funded by grassroots supporters right here in central Virginia. Friend, here’s the truth. We’ve debunked Abigail Spanberger’s moderate claims time and time again. A real moderate wouldn’t have _**voted to impeach President Trump, continued to vote with Pelosi over 90% of the time, and put special interests over Virginians.**_ Nick Freitas is running to **STOP** the socialist agenda, rebuild our economy, lower taxes, and Keep America Great. President Trump made it clear that he needs Nick in Washington to join him in halting the radical agenda and rebuilding our economy. clean_body: Meanwhile, early voting has already begun. | Friend, We really don't have much time. Data show that an estimated 1.1 MILLION voters in North Carolina still know NOTHING about Cal Cunningham 's scandal, because it's getting drowned out by all of Chuck Schumer's $80 million worth of attack ads. I wouldn 't be so worried if we had until November 3 to get the truth out, but voters are ALREADY casting their ballots through early voting. That 's why our campaign needs to make an additional ad-buy for our ad exposing Cunningham before 11:59 P.M. Friend, We have a problem. Early voting began TODAY, but around 1 in 4 voters still do NOT know about Democrat Cal Cunningham's disgraceful affair with a disabled veteran's wife. Cunningham is going to use his multimillion-dollar advantage over us to lock in as many votes as possible while people still have no idea how shameless he truly is... name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: New Poll Shows Statistical Tie in TX-07
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**New Poll Shows Statistical Tie in 7th District Congressional Race**
Houston, TX – A new poll released today by the Hunt campaign shows a competitive race in the 7th District between incumbent Lizzie Fletcher and challenger Wesley Hunt. Fletcher and Hunt are in a statistical tie with Fletcher holding a slim 2% point lead, well within the margin of error of 4%. It also shows Hunt with a stronger favorability margin than Fletcher and possessing a more enthusiastic base of support.
Polling memo with more details can be found [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=66d5cec986654cf192df9e4737b7ff85&_e=g2BSJwiXC78GWNSJbCYhVUMN-3bfYU9pMyeR07088V_t2-f0DtAuOGy2nRoFd9KdUv3xeZWlvLRpdCLfU3UlSdkqqRLgw8jraGYOX5IRy8uIF_ZLqj_J8Q_WNzKCNP0cZ7wVpaXnevtuO4Awiq1WZv-P8UurFf1NZ2-N_7baQ1ap8YgbzI7coCl3kRFsfqRhKyOkPcBjckXVNl3jrleAQSRMHxZ7LN4S6XSnD59ZUyotODkH9cD9tE2PEKSiNYA0ErSopgs45PliEPEqdnaCzUGGzDfor9joaxEd-OX7Dz5rUAKKWRwIwIMV7n76t1a0cmaYU1ou4VHdMJguAdNZzw%3D%3D).
This news comes on the heels of Thursday’s announcement that Hunt out-raised Fletcher by a more than 2 to 1 margin in the 3rd fundraising quarter. Hunt Campaign Manager Jim Hilk released the following statement along with the poll.
_“This survey demonstrates that Lizzie Fletcher is in serious trouble here in the 7th District. Her refusal to stand up for Houston’s energy jobs or demonstrate any independence from Nancy Pelosi has voters looking for a change in representation,” _**said Hilk.** _“Despite relentless false attack ads from Pelosi and Fletcher’s dark money allies smearing combat veteran Wesley Hunt, voters are rejecting Fletcher’s record of intense partisanship and empowering the worst aspects of the Washington swamp. We’re confident that if voters continue to hear our positive message, Wesley Hunt will be victorious on November 3rd.”_
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=66d5cec986654cf192df9e4737b7ff85&_e=g2BSJwiXC78GWNSJbCYhVTH9MpdgH99Hku3HJGyOFxWsFb1gb0JTvIus2jwq_1UnoULg05WnIiXr7kxGG1Bri172zFJ8vfreW82U2t2mm65CJulCWMCJQRgwB_SNHQ3mqujDQxmy-4l9UKTCeFoljUkjS2qA4ggma34NO3E0dMzztX2Bwm2U_JaiZTvX3Pd6CJ0ldypZWyaNTLO8gplEp5WUtK5UBPm5itZ1cAM5PL55PRiq5cTUq48ry35oH5QFHUlBsQkhOYXLcXUHVvR-KXSDawVVORe7yQCGtyMIsRk%3D)****

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Vote. Serve. Pray.
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2653)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | With 18 days until Election Day, many states have started early voting. By the end of this week, 29 states will have kicked things off. We continue to read headlines of missing, duplicated, or wrong mail ballots, broken equipment, wrong poll books, long lines wrapped around buildings, states changing their processes, chaos, and confusion.

In the days and weeks _–_ and maybe months _–_ ahead, I encourage you all to stay focused. Become adept at separating the signal from the noise. There are those that want to wreak havoc on the election process intentionally. That's not America. That's not who we are. Be a part of the solution. Help to make sure this election process is free and fair.

1. VOTE. True the Vote offers [State-by-State Voter Guides](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=av9PoT7lBg2F0e2Bks1Q4twqvEisCftfrxSNfMSAxd0%3D&s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=266A572A21A2635) for all 50 states with important information on when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls. The best way to ensure your vote counts in this election is to vote in person and early. If you can't, you should still vote. Don't take it for granted.

2. SERVE. If you can serve in your local elections, [call your county](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2677) or [call the party or a candidate](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2654), and find out how and where they need help. True the Vote has an [election fraud incident report](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2678). Let it be known if you are seeing something that does not seem quite right.

3. PRAY. The last thing is to pray every day for our leaders and for this election. Have faith.

No one can do everything, but everyone can do something.

Onward!
Catherine Engelbrecht
---

|

|
---
| | IN THE NEWS
---
| | | |
---
| | CATHERINE TO GLENN BECK: 'VOTE IN PERSON AND EARLY'
Voting in this election is crucial. Catherine Engelbrecht, founder and president of True the Vote, joined The Blaze's Glenn Beck to discuss the safest way to make sure your vote counts: If you can, vote "in person and EARLY."
---
| | [ WATCH ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2676)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | NAM PHAM SHARES HIS STORY ON COMMUNIST VIETNAM IN TRUE THE VOTE INFOMERCIAL
Nam Pham is Vietnamese by birth, American by choice. In this video, he discusses the communist government in Vietnam, which has imprisoned many citizens for calling for free and fair elections. Nam emphasizes the freedoms we often take for granted in the U.S. that don't exist in Vietnam, including the right to vote, to run for office, and to have a say in what matters most in your life.
---
| | [ WATCH
](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2679)
---
| | |
---
| | AMID ELECTION CHAOS, CATHERINE PROVIDES SOLUTIONS
In this episode of the podcast, Catherine Engelbrecht discusses the chaos in our current election, how we got into this big mess in the first place, and what is necessary to fix the problems we face. The power to vote _–_ when we use it wisely _–_ can improve our own lives and the lives of those around us.
---
| | [ WATCH ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2675)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | GATEWAY PUNDIT FEATURES TRUE THE VOTE'S KEY TO VICTORY
Groups on the left are using unprecedented measures to flip the election. True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht spoke with Gateway Pundit's Jim Hoft on her advice to patriotic voters to stop the steal!
---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=268A588A20A2667)

subject: Rita’s race is so close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rH0WBYp7lkr1JSa14yjFSEWxVpBm0temU_J5oX0DQcU=/FC50wqJ7x-cALJYFmk7TVU0iQvnK4jJ3-bZnUVXfxbw=?refcode=201016-email-am) The race for IA-02's congressional seat is one of the tightest in the country, and Rita needs our help to win it. **[Will you rush in a $10 donation right now to ensure she has the support she needs?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rH0WBYp7lkr1JSa14yjFSEWxVpBm0temU_J5oX0DQcU=/ID09Rr-fKpxOx3S8x0YuEsRu7jaqqt62kN_LNNpgmCQ=?refcode=201016-email-am&amount=10)** Rita represents the people of this district. She's ready to work to protect health care, our education and strengthen Medicare and Social Security. She'll fight corruption. But right now, those D.C. interests are spending everything they can to beat Rita. Happy Friday - this week’s team member highlight is Christianna!

Christianna is our incredible Digital Organizer, responsible for our stellar graphics, strong branding, and uber-responsive Twitter. **She is super smart and kind, and this team would be, simply put, far less excellent without her.**

Christianna is amazing. She deserves to be working with a fully funded digital budget.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: You’re going to want to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great
body:
It's going to take every Patriot stepping up BIG TIME to win in
November. | Our FINAL FEC Deadline Goal was our biggest
fundraising push ever.

Peter,

I have great news.

Our FINAL FEC Deadline Goal
was our biggest fundraising push ever and American Patriots, like
YOU, stepped up BIG TIME to help us CRUSH it. We're now in the
FINAL WEEKS OF THE ELECTION!

Don't wait to step up later
this week, or tomorrow, or even later today....the time to step
up is RIGHT NOW. This is your moment to re-elect President Trump!

We're going to WIN BIG in
November for one simple reason: unlike the Radical Left and their
Hollywood MEGA DONORS, we have the support of the American
People, like YOU.

With just weeks left to go
until Election Day, it's crucial to keep the momentum on our
side, so my father has decided to do something HUGE for you:

He's extended your 800%-MATCH
for the NEXT HOUR.

My father is really counting
on you to step up. I know you won't let him down.

Please contribute $45 in the
NEXT HOUR and your gift will be 800%-MATCHED. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2250

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $900

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $450

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $405

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

My father has been fighting
nonstop for you and he's not done yet, Peter.

I'm sending my father a
list of every single Patriot who uses their 800%-MATCH in the
NEXT HOUR. Will he see your name?

Please contribute $45 in
the NEXT HOUR for an 800%-MATCH and YOUR NAME will be included on
the next donor list my father sees.

Thank you,

Donald Trump Jr.

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $405

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great
Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax
purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great
Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the
Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth
Ave New York, NY 10022

We believe this is an important way to reach our
grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team.
It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

Privacy Policy

Click here to unsubscribe.

subject: We need you now!
body:
All hands on deck!!

| | | | | | Friday, October 16th 2020
---
|
---
| Volunteers Needed!
---
| Hello, team! It's Regan here. Just 18 days remain until Election Day.
18 short days. There is no time to wait to get involved with our campaign. We need all hands on deck, starting now, for this final stretch.
We need folks at doors, on the phone, in our office, and at early voting locations. We have several different opportunities for you to get involved - we have something for everyone! And we need your help now.
Please forward this email to friends or family who may be interested in joining our final stretch effort!
Contact Wyatt now! (757) 524-2701 wyatt@scotttaylor2020.com
Please see the message from Scott -

| | Team ― Governor Abbott’s recent decision to limit Texas to one polling box per county is a shameless, meritless, brazen attempt at voter suppression. _**It’s just another example that Texas isn’t a red state, it’s a voter suppression state.**_ The order has been lifted in some parts of Texas ― for now ― but Republican efforts to suppress the vote won't end here. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20406408/256867445/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201016_Suppression_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNmYjIyZC1mZjBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jDH0aFbwWL_9wCyXZ8c4MKmBr_PFRMBWYXp7ACZR0-0=) There'll be a battle over this order in the courts, and we’ve got to fight it with everything we can. But this close to the election, we also need to be prepared to reach out to voters and make sure EVERYONE knows how to cast their ballot by November 3rd. **This is going to take a HUGE surge of resources to accomplish. clean_body: | = | | Team ― Governor Abbott’s recent decision to limit Texas to one polling box per county is a shameless, meritless, brazen attempt at voter suppression. It’s just another example that Texas isn’t a red state, it’s a voter suppression state. The order has been lifted in some parts of Texas ― for now ― but Republican efforts to suppress the vote won't end here. = There'll be a battle over this order in the courts, and we’ve got to fight it with everything we can. But this close to the election, we also need to be prepared to reach out to voters and make sure EVERYONE knows how to cast their ballot by November 3rd. This is going to take a HUGE surge of resources to accomplish. We need to ask all our grassroots donors ―= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’ve got to make this energize us even more to turn out to the polls and VOTE this November! Thanks for standing with us, friend. Mike | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: If you have to ask it, mask it
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As I'm sure you know from my emails this week, Rhode Island's data is trending in the wrong direction. We're not in a place where we have to move back a phase yet, but if we don't correct our course, we could be in danger. As a state, we need to buckle down and recommit ourselves to being a part of the solution in order to continue protecting the health of our families and friends.
In this crucial moment, I want our scientists to lead us -- just as they have since the beginning. That's why I asked Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and Dr. Philip Chan from the Rhode Island Department of Health to spend some time today talking about how we can make changes to our behavior and our plans that will help keep Rhode Island safe. You can watch that video by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MdCEkys2S69uo20c7MYRPW9rMi9JtTQa3T7r2g4Wthh3jIm_BT-pKYufDFJTEl2_7YD7JD5AZI5G73YlqX7SqeX8Y7wZG-ox2rZcFjAbP3u4j4ORU8rpyOC3PgJRXQnJVGagy9NXySuJGNPcyKLpC3b80C9WPO3OVVWYe5DD1GD4zfJutnawPZKowOyl3qF4&c=sfpCj_K9PL23uwFEr8mZjfdieVLTXIvgUPeQ8pF__f0WNE65n9k6Qg==&ch=ilXJKsiFqliwOXLhVZrNQS5wyGbDwrg8po310jY2Y2DvvQb739je1A==) or on the image below.
---

| Dr. Alexander-Scott and Dr. Chan covered a lot of issues, like how we got to this point, what we can do to turn it around, and what the holidays will look like. I highly recommend that you take some time this weekend to watch the session and learn more about how we can mitigate the spread of COVID-19, but I did want to highlight one key piece of advice from Dr. Chan: If you have to ask it, mask it.
One of the main reasons that we're seeing a spike in cases is a lapse in mask-wearing in small, intimate groups. We have to recommit to wearing our masks any time we're close to another person we don't share a household with, even if they're close friends or loved ones. I know that can be hard, but it's what we have to do to keep them safe. So whenever you think a mask might be appropriate, it is appropriate.
Please, stay safe this weekend and continue to wear a mask and social distance so that we can turn our numbers around. I'll be on Facebook Live on Monday morning at 10 a.m. with Dr. Jim McDonald of the Rhode Island Department of Health to talk about more ways we can stay safe. I hope you'll join us. You can watch even if you don't have a Facebook account by visitingcDonald of the Rhode Island Department of Health to talk about more ways we can stay safe. I hope you'll join us. You can watch even if you don't have a Facebook account by visiting [facebook.com/GinaMRaimondo](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MdCEkys2S69uo20c7MYRPW9rMi9JtTQa3T7r2g4Wthh3jIm_BT-pKUC1A2rhqQ1fCvJA-WBj3gOPvSNsOSumfvY1_8Us_OotWuJxc9d-wozwdE0-ydKj6mIIO70nMN3xRWdsVyZ7-gMXRWTnKGw34KYbkBOsk3tE&c=sfpCj_K9PL23uwFEr8mZjfdieVLTXIvgUPeQ8pF__f0WNE65n9k6Qg==&ch=ilXJKsiFqliwOXLhVZrNQS5wyGbDwrg8po310jY2Y2DvvQb739je1A==).
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, As I'm sure you know from my emails this week, Rhode Island's data is trending in the wrong direction. We're not in a place where we have to move back a phase yet, but if we don't correct our course, we could be in danger. As a state, we need to buckle down and recommit ourselves to being a part of the solution in order to continue protecting the health of our families and friends. In this crucial moment, I want our scientists to lead us -- just as they have since the beginning. That's why I asked Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and Dr. Philip Chan from the Rhode Island Department of Health to spend some time today talking about how we can make changes to our behavior and our plans that will help keep Rhode Island safe. You can watch that video by clicking == or on the image below. | == | Dr. Alexander-Scott and Dr. Chan covered a lot of issues, like how we got to this point, what we can do to turn it around, and what the holidays will look like.
