name: Lisa Scheller
subject: defend the police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
If you’re like me, you see what’s happening to our cities and you’re appalled. How did it become controversial - or even political - to simply say tha Peter, if you’re like me, you see what’s happening to our cities and you’re appalled. How did it become controversial - or even political - to simply say that we must defend the police?
And yet that’s where we’ve come as a nation. That’s what is on the ballot this November.
When the men and women in blue answer our calls for help, they don’t ask about our political party or who we voted for, they come to our aid no matter the risk to their own personal safety.
Yet high-profile Democrats like my opponent Socialist Susan are refusing to stand up and defend the police or the rule of law. **[I need you to help me show them that not only is this unacceptable — this is dangerous.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8cfe74d493f1409f95481d62a9e60d34&_e=GUU55HS6LKVx8RE6ZoIDrEAS2TBzA-GjNotr4EQFKcosbMkStzZClNGFxxwNXgmHnRWBBQPBHjTlLqtiQLA34zFNRBcc24YOCrdkxMUFYIEoJ36pw_s0eXsSwUju-5K0CxflNTziOE7kPh3vs5seBZMLTJSvzcCTAJGtKNXtKkOCIEGXlP6nEDm_35Kx9f5K9twdCL07h0Hdq3XKwIp0IsNH7f6vupl-_CBctpcXcE3PAM02Tw10tRPW7Uw4wg0y-WFQngBXt1dolctWC0dOtWRehIx_JHUQzbtqLgiL2JUG-k8c-4L5whRLmWd2bIT9zClMhsh46KQQQ-9_FB1Gd49yErxN1bsV3hF3XPy--HFrQp9-UCV-QDbmH5mo73yP2YvcX8EPC2UoUt7GR6aWKXFaA6CSCWWOqHdncDyJ2CRR5Dpe5gRctBf13hXKYj-z)** [**Stand with me to defend the rule of law >>>**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8cfe74d493f1409f95481d62a9e60d34&_e=GUU55HS6LKVx8RE6ZoIDrEAS2TBzA-GjNotr4EQFKcosbMkStzZClNGFxxwNXgmHnRWBBQPBHjTlLqtiQLA34zFNRBcc24YOCrdkxMUFYIEoJ36pw_s0eXsSwUju-5K0CxflNTziOE7kPh3vs5seBZMLTJSvzcCTAJGtKNXtKkOCIEGXlP6nEDm_35Kx9f5K9twdCL07h0Hdq3XKwIp0IiRhWr3Ks8X8Is6Fcx799_HeHUBwWL3hhqF5EjVyn6nmjvzSV7XrSszLIH75aVArzJquRufdn27KSfgGg9tEBtW9OslM9CwrTI4kJta6AyZryzMSVvNN1-lyvxCZQ5a9I0nnVq-4FdYl8V_5QCmYkNlcKCFqXVoGXNfNmG4qm6w0q6Z8nQBhQDYuRiNTCwpKmlLqeFiyaisc5WFtE4V5AoDezMWKkMOj3j6SKVMv-1_w) You know where I stand, Peter. But my opponent, Susan Wild has shown that she’ll go to great lengths to keep the radicals in her party happy. She’ll stand with Nancy Pelosi no matter what.
Can you chip in now to defend the rule of law in the Lehigh Valley?
We cannot lose this seat, Peter -- we’ve seen the violence that Democrats are willing to excuse and the chaos they’ve allowed to spread under their watch.
**[Lehigh Valley won’t stand for this anti-law enforcement sentiment to take hold -- will you help my campaign fight back?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8cfe74d493f1409f95481d62a9e60d34&_e=GUU55HS6LKVx8RE6ZoIDrEAS2TBzA-GjNotr4EQFKcosbMkStzZClNGFxxwNXgmHnRWBBQPBHjTlLqtiQLA34zFNRBcc24YOCrdkxMUFYIEoJ36pw_s0eXsSwUju-5K0CxflNTziOE7kPh3vs5seBZMLTJSvzcCTAJGtKNXtKkOCIEGXlP6nEDm_35Kx9f5K9twdCL07h0Hdq3XKwIp0In5ntmOiT7IwLVlAPWWSQLJZci71OGVY7GTMJHijKaP9L_qFzfrQGrqoVr9Bb5HNdlSJSRZerJ49MjHofBHgfzuoVCEnTYs39Aify4rwjG8kx2fzFY2jfsZMNIS3zby7yF3JukNoLq7UR3T9RWd8EeCcXbx28Yb4NqUdQpOkYW3tC8oDBoZKxo4oFEtJMgTnzBAQoguMkUQCkYSnPKtbU2az7AcVQE8OgsYcvK1fNbt8)** Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. Peter,

**We received our latest polling results last night and I'm currently trailing my opponent by _just_ five points**, but within the margin of error. That’s not the result I was hoping for, nevertheless I’m extremely optimistic that **[with your financial support](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=95d20f57364446bbb9992e615ddb5b4e&_e=MnT0g9WTFRgLLZguHokMy3AwuGWi9H22JyXfAZQN-Bj-ZaxTGlL9k7tOCNFj-oLp9jZE6yvsHpaRkHD6DOq5lUsz6AC7s_pBSUkNAmpJSRCPlYPOp_fJy0KLKYZ5z06eIrZu2cjNb1IEBxtUuGiIXaUk4l5BGrYcypIAX58FckWQVpQSWwlrxfbGlD0N6E0jBiUaW2mMZiW66CoIZhVpL_OcKlz8oWz7Hf_eglJzuY6LEBQpAjexeXg7lVAd9xa1n_FoVScI5r6sjG57PGmxtwLbCIm8Rz-vDerX1cfsh2wK5Bv8FSv5gkAVJK3hAaoR)** , we can close the deficit and pull off a win.

To put things in perspective for you, in 2018 Peter DeFazio’s margin of victory was 16 POINTS.

Won’t you consider **[an immediate contribution of $5 or more right now](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=95d20f57364446bbb9992e615ddb5b4e&_e=MnT0g9WTFRgLLZguHokMy3AwuGWi9H22JyXfAZQN-Bj-ZaxTGlL9k7tOCNFj-oLp9jZE6yvsHpaRkHD6DOq5lUsz6AC7s_pBSUkNAmpJSRAH0BnXbfyp8chf89kw_O5CLeaPk_zFdFrsTTlfqN2DuUPlZYgozA-S5MuV_g_odROE0py8yukCvDNsmL-PYh8JC_9vmaQ0Bq_epDiI5_xIorRkwfIIeeSptHdFHTaZ7ekfCYOIxvp-Rno0nP91_33SYyIGbQqBRcLfvdK_eeUWi-HlgZgPOqjv3RIY62f6Bmnikw1CNNjPfgOuRaHG8-Q0)** to help me close the gap with the original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal?

clean_body: Super PACs have now spent $2 million to save my opponent and sink my campaign. PLEASE help me fight back. I just wanted to send you a quick note to say thanks and update you, we set an impossible goal this month and we didn't quite hit it... Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, We received our latest polling results last night and I'm currently trailing my opponent by just five points, but within the margin of error. That’s not the result I was hoping for, nevertheless I’m extremely optimistic that , we can close the deficit and pull off a win. To put things in perspective for you, in 2018 Peter DeFazio’s margin of victory was 16 POINTS. | Friend,
It was a landmark week for Kelly - who met with hundreds of Georgians on the campaign trail, picked up some major endorsements, scored key victories for our conservative values, and took a stand against China, Big Tech, and the radical Left.
Kelly was busy traveling the state this week - making campaign stops in Cumming, Canton, Evans, and Albany. She was even joined by Senator Tom Cotton (R-AR) for two huge [events](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8Guc10KkqyMLaB7-kipdQfKMdz4GRBnT4SEL2Ni8RE6ZlO6OoG0BDMOWw9u8RMOOw1V8pUScVvbIlVKxCtss5Wt8rY-0sbXMeP8dfurYuRH4ErfUHorcDkHCYrna_eLpAHba&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==), where [hundreds](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8GucmVBXt_lrMMW2eC4M15LjRxRfD3BqNJir9VzlzBTCLk4R-AZp0VBYvPQYJnvw8upxr7H9Xa-wHpm3Fke-gBhOg5U2zgFBx1GunBwqYrNIFYZFFcPGxTT51I7wJlxAk0J7&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) of Georgians turned out to rally around her strong conservative [record ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8GucIfmzK3BlXd1hJ-Vf5BoWK02m0HeFytRUEDMMRjAA4TWPiwxHlC6BLQxGsy3qB41itf1-fAEIAbYugfwMiWzArljm3wiMo9ZlSarYmOaZwkUdpIfJx1Xbhql39Hu1dab_&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==)and [vision](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8Guc0AmJO1CGDh-ddc_t3pagIvw3m7n36zNcOpSqQO2-Rwj5PjaJgsr3euxul-ezCNW-stB_0Ii8uNeIiXK4ejyoV2oQkIXqEGVEMMyOi5EFNVj3ghjnBJiqoxWvm6hgz1UN&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) for our state.

| Kelly even had the honor of [addressing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8GucvOvEPncSLkinbH73PX_ijexCkPPJNdWpkr5LuYwWt3vleZdY7tCa5VFqEv67xLLfkJQGYykHAeZfAJPgCF70UaCTPzm4HrTwyUAbkcW_nz9NIyi0IIdhLGvq-hoj9WSR&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) members of the Family Policy Alliance of Georgia this week - where she spoke out strongly for religious liberty and the right to life. In fact, Kelly is proud to have the [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnSDGrpbs7x3E6IIuINlJxls_ZlXEB9NPHUhJeF-1HFrGnAmukienUNgzBMX4PxYYVOjdThFi-G8980BWhrplIkLQ0HFbpeKcIR7rbrNfUVmE6YUTNLkDPYVTNHBlBvroeXK-25Uum0qOuK6t2aOxzdpV4JwVFv2affKdGiI4-Kt_rojjgk_PnSDkpqP6c1vOJ9w0lsRdSt2vxJ3lO9OYjFGR0raBXdh1nYHB7eJd6OiP&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) of the FPA of GA, as well as other major pro-life groups including the [National Right to Life Committee](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnRUBnIFnqPtu9tbvVqlHyRJHIQOmGpYBfESpixez_99ThyywyVdl3uVgls4ef7dVtydqv_qjpeG42mTnjyhGMSGzAFQBd6mcM8XH4OxF9zBeCDt2TlcWccu--0DIEW7CpYdd6h8NRVCKwdM3PKep6xNJATQNDZHyyZ5JrxWx6xJRMopf7xRYUH4=&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) and the [Susan B. Anthony](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqneuCHSzXBNQYYvqMhtUL_6ag2DOH4njuo6rkU9q3Dmei1T9bPVj4wrmxmirZqVBdD9TUMpq1V-5CIcE1kxB7-SwzpUaFMxSZPI0BJLG3D90gSKe26OG3DSOYY1P4pKDwifBdSTA-gsvZliwlOfLUvSwuO5sUbSSBvWeB4hqnJ9M2GdhsxXU86g7Yzk2k0-jYF-RreTqLxuqw50j90o3pUKCtA8teToQzew==&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) list.

| In major news, Kelly rolled out some BIG endorsements this week - starting with [future Congresswoman](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8GucZmmCErCuM0DLJ-EkGjkfVkg_wCFGAifi3h71ZQ4UkhN6MO0HhdcoNSq28e1ncBqSh1sC4o8mi8PkHPJrTAxpDYC3OntIDguH&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==) from the 14th District, Marjorie Taylor Greene. As Marjorie [said](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zYI74hIBDoFmK4FFi_UuNWaXIEIcBwhJmo5NGudVu4BxHdhQ7EaqnWBQC0vQ8GucKRq77UwYXXPq1xycRZNBPoiF911iR0sAUAGfqoq8AZ5tb8wMGTgztStpRTlF53x1chbUKZKBMJtN3L1pHjtvybBjPUwOzfwGsMdj_fYlJuxdaEz6hJSsER7Wspz3xUpN&c=OPnsWWFm4Ti1hOnc2IROCMxIULW1PGbALwv5nbn0HDgy8jJDV4QuVw==&ch=5e8E4-j21Dpjnpwj99kylPCG_1QqdnB4iR-ZwTJbSsBgQidkdTARvg==):
"Over the last ten months, Kelly Loeffler has proven she is a conservative fighter by introducing and voting for legislation to end Antifa/BLM violence, Back the Blue, fighting for the unborn, protecting our Second Amendment, keeping biological men out of women's sports, and holding China accountable. As the most conservative Senator in Washington, she has sponsored legislation and fought for the key issues I care about and will be fighting for as the first Congresswoman for Northwest Georgia. | Hi , For the time being we have a conservative majority on the Supreme Court that will select cases and decide them in favor of our religious liberties.
**But that majority is at risk! ** We must confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to ensure that conservatives will have a majority of justices on the court who will defend our First Amendment rights. [**Help me continue to push for ACB's confirmation with a quick $30 donation to our campaign right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDM4NzE5ODgzNzQ0Nzc4JmM9bzN3MCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2MDQ2MTUmZD1xMGMzZzJy.0JVDJaVxm50ePWISLH-Zsdj9LnZhK3MHdtmObRaf6MQ)

| The Court’s current decisions are encouraging because they both affirm and clarify religious freedoms, setting precedent that will guide the Nation for years to come. **Yet, one thing remains clear—we must continue to fight for our Constitutional rights. Liberals have shown that they will challenge our right to religious freedom time and time again.**
With an originalist like Judge Amy Coney Barrett on the court, we can be sure that SCOTUS will uphold our constitutionally guaranteed religious freedoms. But there are moderate Republican senators who are threatening to vote against her confirmation. I need your help to convince them to vote to confirm ACB. [**Send a one time donation of $45 or more to our campaign right now to help me continue lobbying these moderates.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDM4NzE5ODgzNzQ0Nzc4JmM9bzN3MCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2MDQ2MjcmZD1wMW0xcDV2.ldCcfLw8UtKFB2XN6zfrJzH437DoEA1jdVznuPzqNiI) **[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDM4NzE5ODgzNzQ0Nzc4JmM9bzN3MCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2MDQ2MzAmZD1vNWU4bjB4.UDAXUEde0FZI_olqhXWw7PIolr4fiLriqEikWWGMH6Y)**

clean_body: | | For the time being we have a conservative majority on the Supreme Court that will select cases and decide them in favor of our religious liberties. | | | | | | | | Hi , For the time being we have a conservative majority on the Supreme Court that will select cases and decide them in favor of our religious liberties. But that majority is at risk! We must confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to ensure that conservatives will have a majority of justices on the court who will defend our First Amendment rights. | | | | | | | | | | The Court’s current decisions are encouraging because they both affirm and clarify religious freedoms, setting precedent that will guide the Nation for years to come. Yet, one thing remains clear—we must continue to fight for our Constitutional rights. Liberals have shown that they will challenge our right to religious freedom time and time again. With an originalist like Judge Amy Coney Barrett on the court, we can be sure that SCOTUS will uphold our constitutionally guaranteed religious freedoms. But there are moderate Republican senators who are threatening to vote against her confirmation. I need your help to convince them to vote to confirm ACB. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you and God Bless, | Jim Inhofe | | mailto:U.S. Senator | | ---|--- tel:Oklahoma | | | | | | Contributions to Friends of Jim Inhofe Committee are not deductible as charitable donations for tax purposes. Federal election law requires political committees and individuals to report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for contributions $200 or more an election cycle may contribute up to $2,800 for the Primary election and $2,800 for the General election. Contributions are prohibited from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, national banks, nationals without permanent residency status, and from any individual contributing another’s funds. Not printed at Government Expense. | | | | | | | Friends of Jim Inhofe PO Box 13300 Oklahoma City, OK 73113

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Protect these blue Senate seats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
I'm writing to ask for your support for three of my Democratic colleagues in tight 2020 races: Doug Jones in Alabama, Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire, and Tina Smith in Minnesota.
Democrats are fired up to flip Senate seats across the country -- but in order to ensure we have a Democratic majority, we must defend all of our Democratic champions on the ballot this year.
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution right now to re-elect our Democratic Senators?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201015-incumbents-slate?refcode=em201015i_515&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201015-incumbents-slate?refcode=em201015i_515&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
I am proud to serve alongside all three of these incredible Senators and witness firsthand their fight for people in their states and across the nation on issues like preserving affordable health care and defending protections for patients living with pre-existing conditions from GOP attacks.
We can't afford to lose these Democratic voices in the Senate. There is just too much at stake.
**[Pitch in $5 to help re-elect my friends Doug Jones, Jeanne Shaheen, and Tina Smith.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201015-incumbents-slate?refcode=em201015i_515&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201015-incumbents-slate?refcode=em201015i_515&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933aa/22080b68/7a6a5b0c/46021846/1971290237/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933aa/22080b68/7a6a5b0c/46021845/1971290237/VEsA/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

body:
We need to flip four seats to secure a majority. And we can get halfway there by electing Jon Ossoff in Georgia and Adrian Perkins in Louisiana. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b5c3/3709757667/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Watching this week's illegitimate Supreme Court confirmation hearings, one thing has been clear: it's never been more important for Democrats to take back the Senate.

So that's what I'd like to focus on in this email.

**We need to flip four seats to secure a majority. And we can get halfway there by electing Jon Ossoff in Georgia and Adrian Perkins in Louisiana.**

They're both running strong campaigns to defeat Republican incumbents. They could both use a big burst of grassroots donations right now to fight back against Republican attacks. And I know that this team is ready to fight by their side.

**[If you're able to, will you split a donation between Jon Ossoff, Adrian Perkins, and Warren Democrats so we can flip the Senate and elect champions for working people across the country? $2 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b5c4/3709757667/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpvLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwOEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jo-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW08F_EGR_END_E_20201016_V1S2_P")**

As a mayor, veteran, and Bronze Star recipient, Adrian Perkins knows firsthand how to lead in times of crisis. He will put people before politics to protect health care, ensure families have access to affordable, high-quality child care, and help solve our climate crisis.

Without taking any contributions from corporate PACs, Adrian has raised money faster than any other first-time Democratic Senate candidate in Louisiana history. And just last year, Louisiana re-elected a sitting Democratic governor for the first time in over 40 years.

We can't win if we don't fight -- and I'm very glad to fight by Adrian's side.

In Georgia, Jon Ossoff is building a grassroots campaign that's turned this race into a toss-up. He's served Georgia families as an aide on Capitol Hill, he's helped expose corruption as an investigative journalist, and he's ready to fight for health care, clean energy, and economic relief for working people as a U.S. Senator.

Adrian, Jon, and Warren Democrats up and down the ballot are counting on grassroots donors like you to power them to victory.

**[Please chip in if you can to support Adrian Perkins, Jon Ossoff, and Warren Democrats in the home stretch of the most important election of our lifetimes.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b5c4/3709757667/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpvLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwOEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jo-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW08F_EGR_END_E_20201016_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b5c4/3709757667/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpvLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwOEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jo-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW08F_EGR_END_E_20201016_V1S2_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b41a/3709757667/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b41c/3709757667/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b41e/3709757667/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b400/3709757667/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b402/3709757667/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251e5/45c30650/1c6824838/66e8b404/3709757667/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Twitter’s Partisan Censors, The Senate Should Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, and Quickly, Operation Legend: Over 5,000 Arrests | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11de72f483&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Twitter’s Partisan Censors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c66e12a9e&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“The political actions taken Wednesday by Twitter—and to a lesser extent Facebook—went far beyond normal content moderation,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. “Silicon Valley's partisan interference flies in the face of American instincts about democracy, fair play, and the spirit of the First Amendment.”
---
|
---
| [**First Lady Melania Trump: ‘My Personal Experience with COVID-19’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63af65ff25&e=3ee4985eea)
-WhiteHouse.gov
“It was two weeks ago when I received the diagnosis that so many Americans across our country and the world had already received—I tested positive for COVID-19. To make matters worse, my husband, and our nation’s Commander-in-Chief, received the same news,” First Lady Melania Trump writes.

**MORE:**[**“Give focus to our next generation,” the First Lady says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9bce4e8dd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The Senate Should Confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, and Quickly**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=60866c0784&e=3ee4985eea)
**_-_**_The Hill_
“The unfortunate vacancy left by the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg must be filled in a timely manner to continue the important role of the judiciary. The Constitution is clear—the president has a solemn duty to make a nomination for the Senate’s consideration. President Trump fulfilled his duty by putting forward Barrett, and now the Senate must do its job,” Chase Martin writes.

**WATCH:**[**Why Amy Coney Barrett says she answered the call to serve**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=703ae3a3f1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Administration Announces Deal With CVS and Walgreens to Administer Coronavirus Vaccine to Seniors in Long-Term Care**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76eecf2ebd&e=3ee4985eea)
_-_ CNBC
President Trump just announced “a deal with CVS Health and Walgreens to administer coronavirus vaccines to the elderly and staff in long-term care facilities,” Berkeley Lovelace Jr. writes. “The vaccine will be free and available for residents in all long-term care settings,” including nursing homes and assisted living facilities.

**WATCH:**[**Seniors will be first in line for a safe and effective vaccine!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4e0749503&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Operation Legend: Over 5,000 Arrests Made to Reduce Violent Crimes After a 4-Year Old’s Murder**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=022a4928d4&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Daily Caller_
“Since the start of the [Justice Department’s Operation Legend] in July there have been over 5,000 arrests including federal offenses, drug charges, and murder charges,” Kimberly Eade reports. Violent crime spiked across major U.S. cities following riots this summer. “Kansas City has a 40 percent increase of homicides compared to last year. President Donald Trump promised to protect cities that have high rates of violent crimes.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba64598cc8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=384c71eee8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7cc5b956e9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Lunch with Corky Messner and Sen. Tom Cotton!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| Corky Messner wants you to join him and Sen. Tom Cotton for lunch! Read more >> |
---
Derek,
Corky Messner is hosting a luncheon with Senator Tom Cotton on Monday, October 19th and wants you to join!
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDg4OTUwMzkwMjk4MzU2JmM9bjZnOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2NTYzNDQmZD1jOWo5cDdz.N0MPuk5bhy0l6PB9mP0wymQ-4EoWoaex9O66ZW1A364)
---
**Where** : The Grand At Bedford Village Inn
**When** : Monday, October 19th, 12:00 P.M. - 1:15 P.M.
**RSVP** : [_https://secure.winred.com/messner-for-senate/cotton-luncheon_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDg4OTUwMzkwMjk4MzU2JmM9bjZnOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2NTYzNTAmZD1sM245aTdh.4uZ_ZZ0pb9hxr7zJ67ibJP1hphdBchouetfUgq-csXo)
Corky is a West Point graduate, veteran, proven businessman, and principled Conservative running for U.S. Senate against Jeanne Shaheen.
Corky and Sen. Cotton align on many of the most important issues facing our country like economic freedom and personal liberty. _He might be from Arkansas, but he embodies New Hampshire's "Live Free or Die" spirit!_
By joining the two of them on Monday, you’re going to get a look “under the hood” of this tight race for U.S. Senate. And you will be helping Corky end Jeanne Shaheen’s tenure “working” for the Granite State!
Tickets for this event are still available, but availability is limited. Don’t miss out on your chance to reserve your seat at the table! [_**Just click or tap here**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDg4OTUwMzkwMjk4MzU2JmM9bjZnOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2NTYzNTYmZD1yNncwbDFv.5RH6yR8p5dScAYV0YGgOvZU999SM8JV6KKedDaPaGSo).

\- Team NHGOP
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTMzNDg4OTUwMzkwMjk4MzU2JmM9bjZnOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzI2NTYzNTkmZD1iNnA0azRt.Mvko4dP9TtPfXMD3R1v_50d4Hi1gkepSyRICYq1n6gM)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Biden?=
subject: I'm hoping to get your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Biden_President_Logo.png

Folks, it's Joe. I hope this email finds you well.

We're just a few weeks away from Election Day, and boy has time moved quickly. It feels like just yesterday we launched this battle for the soul of the nation, and now we're in the home stretch.

Our team is finalizing our plans for the rest of the campaign, everything from our advertising plans to our organizing plans and more. But, since we began this campaign, we've always made our biggest decisions with the help of the folks who power this campaign, and that includes you.

That's why I asked my team to pull a list of everyone who has responded to our Fall Strategy Survey. But I didn't see your name on that list. Can you add your response right now? (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc)

YES, I'LL TAKE THE SURVEY >> (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc)

These decisions that we make as a team will have an enormous impact on the results we wake up to on November 4th, and we can't have any regrets.

So this survey is too important to not respond to today, and I'm hoping when I get the next list of respondents to this strategy survey, I'll see your name on there.

Please, add your response and weigh in on our fall plans. It will only take a few minutes of your time, I promise: (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc)

YES, I'LL TAKE THE SURVEY >> (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.05_B2_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__reac-mc)

Thank you for all you do,

Joseph R. Biden Jr.

============================================================
** (https://www.facebook.com/joebiden)
** (https://twitter.com/joebiden)
** (https://www.youtube.com/joebiden)
** (https://www.instagram.com/joebiden)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information ** click here (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information)
. If you would like to receive fewer emails, ** click here (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails)
. If you would like to unsubscribe, ** click here (https://joebiden.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c865624bf2b98e5c560dafac1&id=969f8e3aee&e=0aa781c4f3&c=20cc1dd9dd)
.

Thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden’s Presidential campaign.

** Change occurs because the conscience of a country begins to rise up and demand — demand change. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1)

This isn’t the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

** DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN » (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25)

Paid for by Biden for President

name: Ted Cruz
subject: One Vote Away

subject: Coalitions of support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
One of the most gratifying aspects of my role is to help build coalitions across the state for the party and for Governor Holcomb. This year has been | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/were-doing-this-together-469814?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Coalitions of Support_**
One of the most gratifying aspects of my role is to help build coalitions across the state for the party and for **Governor Holcomb**. This year has been a whirlwind as I have met with so many wonderful Hoosiers and groups that are making a difference in our state.

That's included our business leaders with groups like the Indiana Chamber of Commerce, the National Federation of Independent Businesses, and the Associated Builders and Contractors of Indiana/Kentucky, who have worked hard to keep our economy growing through this pandemic.

It's included our police and firefighters. I'm so honored that as they go out and stand for us daily, several of their top associations -- including the Professional Firefighters Union of Indiana, the Indiana State Police Alliance, and the Fraternal Order of Police -- have chosen to stand with Governor Holcomb in support of his reelection.

It's included those who stand for our 2nd Amendment rights, such as the NRA.

And it's included the strongest defenders of life in this state, the Indiana Right to Life.

I thank all of them for their time and efforts. Just today, we witnessed a great example of that coalition building when Indiana Right to Life submitted an op-ed supporting **Governor Holcomb's** fight for life. [You can read it here. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b52d1ef8e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

This is among dozens and dozens of other examples that show the depth and breadth of the support for the Republican Party and our candidates from **President Trump** and **Vice President Pence** , **Governor Holcomb** and **Lt. Governor Crouch** , **Todd Rokita** , our congressional and statehouse candidates and local candidates across the state.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO** : _Chairman Hupfer has been doing a lot more Zoom interviews to share our Republican message across the state. Check out this behind-the-scenes photo as he prepares to go live for a media interview at our Indiana GOP headquarters in Indianapolis. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_More Hoosier Jobs Are On The Way!_** It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**! As he continues building One Indiana for All, he is working hard to create more opportunities for Hoosiers.

On Thursday, **Governor Holcomb** joined local officials and executives of POET, the world's largest biofuels producer, to break ground on an expansion to the company’s bioprocessing facility in Alexandria.

Thanks to our state's business-friendly environment, POET is investing $25 million into its Indiana operations and is planning to scale-up production of purified alcohol, a key component of hand sanitizer. To make this announcement even better, POET purchases more than 100 million bushels of Indiana-produced corn annually. This supports Hoosier farmers and the state’s agricultural economy. And with this expansion, that number is growing.

This week, **Governor Holcomb** also announced that the U.S. Department of Defense will establish its Joint Hypersonics Transition Office (JHTO) Systems Engineering Field Activity in Indiana, accelerating research and development (R&D) and testing in hypersonic technologies at Naval Surface Warfare Center (NSWC) Crane Division.

**Governor Holcomb** has set a goal to triple Indiana’s defense investment by 2024, and this huge announcement is bringing us another step closer to that goal. The new facility will allow the Department of Defense to develop and improve technologies and capabilities in hypersonics by utilizing NSWC Crane's strategic assets and growing network of government, industry and academic partners. _**"Today's announcement is another signal to the world that Indiana is poised to be a leader in hypersonics, with strategic assets such as NSWC Crane and our world-class research institutions fueling growth and advancements in the field. We're excited the Department of Defense has chosen Indiana to establish its JHTO Systems Engineering Field Activity, and grateful to our state's leaders in Washington D.C. and here at home for their commitment to increasing defense investment and opportunities in Indiana." -Governor Holcomb**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=341dfa30ed&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f8234085f9&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a81c3ca75f&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=598ec19c39&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Judge Barrett Proves Qualifications & Wisdom
at Confirmation Hearings_**
The Supreme Court confirmation hearings have finished, and Judge Amy Coney Barrett proved to all Americans that she's more than qualified to join the high court!

Democrats spent their time during the confirmation hearings asking questions trying to trip her up -- but they struck out every time. Her answers were quick, concise, and to the point. At one point during the hearing, she was even asked to show what notes she had written down on her note pad. In response, she flipped it around, showing it was empty ([watch that moment here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0ab93b7533&e=1acd9bb3d6)).

Amy Coney Barrett showed time and time again during the hearings that she was not there for games, and is ready to join the U.S. Supreme Court!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b7a63dbbe&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Endorsement Alert: Gov. Holcomb and Todd Rokita Endorsed
by Times of Northwest Indiana**
We have more big endorsement news! The Times of Northwest Indiana has [endorsed both Governor Holcomb for reelection and Todd Rokita for attorney general](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=84c5b2a7f8&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Check out what they had to say about **Governor Holcomb** below:
_** "Incumbent Gov. Eric Holcomb continues to ensure projects and priorities for Northwest Indiana remain at the top of his agenda. Holcomb has demonstrated a keen understanding of how our Region's economic fortunes feed the state as a whole...Holcomb deserves another term to see this and so many other initiatives through."**_
Check out what they had to say about **Todd Rokita** below:
_**"We endorse Region native and former Republican Congressman Todd Rokita for the office of attorney general.. Rokita would make a worthy watchdog in this role and has shown the type of tough posture to be effective."**_
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b400e1ba9f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**New Ad: Governor Holcomb’s Leadership is Building
One Indiana for All**_
**Governor Holcomb's** latest ad, [titled “Momentum,”](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e373f31ab5&e=1acd9bb3d6) features a Hoosier mother and small business owner from Boone County. She discusses how **Governor Holcomb’s** leadership has helped build Indiana’s momentum over the last four years – and how his leadership will continue that momentum over the next four years. That leadership includes:
* **New Jobs** : Companies have committed to create more than 100,000 new Hoosier jobs since 2017 – with a record high wage of $28.60/hour in 2019.
* **Higher Teacher Pay** : Last year, the state paid down a teacher pension liability for schools, helping 229 out of 304 school bargaining units statewide (98% of school corporations) report increased teacher compensation.
* **Improved Internet Connections** : Governor Holcomb has made expanding affordable, high-speed broadband to unserved communities a top priority of his administration. That’s why he’s launched the $100 million Next Level Connections Broadband Grant Program.
* **Skilling Up Our Workforce** : Governor Holcomb launched [Next Level Jobs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a927697efb&e=1acd9bb3d6) to offer free training to Hoosiers looking to skill up for a high-wage, high-demand jobs – programs expanded this year to help Hoosiers impacted by the pandemic.

[\--> Click here to watch Governor Holcomb's new ad <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8433767190&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aa59894581&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**New Ad: Todd Rokita is a Leader**_ **Todd Rokita** is a true leader who will always protect Indiana taxpayers, protect Hoosier families from crime, support our law enforcement, and protect our Constitutional rights.

Watch his [new ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b133e9e14&e=1acd9bb3d6) where Terry Dove talks about her experiences working with Todd in the Indiana Secretary of State's office. [\--> Click Here to Watch Todd Rokita's New Ad <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=daca04a141&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Victoria Spartz Endorsed By Congresswoman Susan Brooks**_ Another big endorsement this week: **Congresswoman Susan Brooks** endorsed **Victoria Spartz** to fill her seat in the 5th District!

Congresswoman Susan Brooks said, "[**Victoria Spartz**] will change Washington and not let it change her. Her commitment will always be to the people of Indiana's Congressional 5th District"

To follow along with **Victora Spartz's** campaign follow her on social media with the links below. [\--> Click here to follow Victoria Spartz on Facebook <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=970aaea90a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: One of the most gratifying aspects of my role is to help build coalitions across the state for the party and for Governor Holcomb. This year has been | | | | | | | | Coalitions of Support One of the most gratifying aspects of my role is to help build coalitions across the state for the party and for Governor Holcomb. This year has been a whirlwind as I have met with so many wonderful Hoosiers and groups that are making a difference in our state. That's included our business leaders with groups like the Indiana Chamber of Commerce, the National Federation of Independent Businesses, and the Associated Builders and Contractors of Indiana/Kentucky, who have worked hard to keep our economy growing through this pandemic. It's included our police and firefighters. I'm so honored that as they go out and stand for us daily, several of their top associations -- including the Professional Firefighters Union of Indiana, the Indiana State Police Alliance, and the Fraternal Order of Police -- have chosen to stand with Governor Holcomb in support of his reelection. It's included those who stand for our 2nd Amendment rights, such as the NRA. And it's included the strongest defenders of life in this state, the Indiana Right to Life. I thank all of them for their time and efforts. Just today, we witnessed a great example of that coalition building when Indiana Right to Life submitted an op-ed supporting Governor Holcomb's fight for life. This is among dozens and dozens of other examples that show the depth and breadth of the support for the Republican Party and our candidates from President Trump and Vice President Pence , Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch , Todd Rokita , our congressional and statehouse candidates and local candidates across the state. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO : Chairman Hupfer has been doing a lot more Zoom interviews to share our Republican message across the state. Check out this behind-the-scenes photo as he prepares to go live for a media interview at our Indiana GOP headquarters in Indianapolis. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | More Hoosier Jobs Are On The Way! It's been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! As he continues building One Indiana for All, he is working hard to create more opportunities for Hoosiers. On Thursday, Governor Holcomb joined local officials and executives of POET, the world's largest biofuels producer, to break ground on an expansion to the company’s bioprocessing facility in Alexandria. Thanks to our state's business-friendly environment, POET is investing $25 million into its Indiana operations and is planning to scale-up production of purified alcohol, a key component of hand sanitizer. To make this announcement even better, POET purchases more than 100 million bushels of Indiana-produced corn annually. This supports Hoosier farmers and the state’s agricultural economy. And with this expansion, that number is growing. This week, Governor Holcomb also announced that the U.S. Department of Defense will establish its Joint Hypersonics Transition Office (JHTO) Systems Engineering Field Activity in Indiana, accelerating research and development (R&D) and testing in hypersonic technologies at Naval Surface Warfare Center (NSWC) Crane Division. Governor Holcomb has set a goal to triple Indiana’s defense investment by 2024, and this huge announcement is bringing us another step closer to that goal. The new facility will allow the Department of Defense to develop and improve technologies and capabilities in hypersonics by utilizing NSWC Crane's strategic assets and growing network of government, industry and academic partners. "Today's announcement is another signal to the world that Indiana is poised to be a leader in hypersonics, with strategic assets such as NSWC Crane and our world-class research institutions fueling growth and advancements in the field. We're excited the Department of Defense has chosen Indiana to establish its JHTO Systems Engineering Field Activity, and grateful to our state's leaders in Washington D.C. and here at home for their commitment to increasing defense investment and opportunities in Indiana." -Governor Holcomb To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Judge Barrett Proves Qualifications & Wisdom at Confirmation Hearings The Supreme Court confirmation hearings have finished, and Judge Amy Coney Barrett proved to all Americans that she's more than qualified to join the high court! Democrats spent their time during the confirmation hearings asking questions trying to trip her up -- but they struck out every time. Her answers were quick, concise, and to the point. At one point during the hearing, she was even asked to show what notes she had written down on her note pad. In response, she flipped it around, showing it was empty (). Amy Coney Barrett showed time and time again during the hearings that she was not there for games, and is ready to join the U.S. Supreme Court! | | | Endorsement Alert: Gov. Holcomb and Todd Rokita Endorsed by Times of Northwest Indiana We have more big endorsement news! The Times of Northwest Indiana has . Check out what they had to say about Governor Holcomb below: "Incumbent Gov. Eric Holcomb continues to ensure projects and priorities for Northwest Indiana remain at the top of his agenda. Holcomb has demonstrated a keen understanding of how our Region's economic fortunes feed the state as a whole...Holcomb deserves another term to see this and so many other initiatives through." Check out what they had to say about Todd Rokita below: "We endorse Region native and former Republican Congressman Todd Rokita for the office of attorney general.. Rokita would make a worthy watchdog in this role and has shown the type of tough posture to be effective." | | | | New Ad: Governor Holcomb’s Leadership is Building One Indiana for All Governor Holcomb's latest ad, features a Hoosier mother and small business owner from Boone County. She discusses how Governor Holcomb’s leadership has helped build Indiana’s momentum over the last four years – and how his leadership will continue that momentum over the next four years. That leadership includes: New Jobs : Companies have committed to create more than 100,000 new Hoosier jobs since 2017 – with a record high wage of $28.60/hour in 2019. Higher Teacher Pay : Last year, the state paid down a teacher pension liability for schools, helping 229 out of 304 school bargaining units statewide (98% of school corporations) report increased teacher compensation. Improved Internet Connections : Governor Holcomb has made expanding affordable, high-speed broadband to unserved communities a top priority of his administration. That’s why he’s launched the $100 million Next Level Connections Broadband Grant Program. Skilling Up Our Workforce : Governor Holcomb launched to offer free training to Hoosiers looking to skill up for a high-wage, high-demand jobs – programs expanded this year to help Hoosiers impacted by the pandemic. | | | New Ad: Todd Rokita is a Leader Todd Rokita is a true leader who will always protect Indiana taxpayers, protect Hoosier families from crime, support our law enforcement, and protect our Constitutional rights. Watch his where Terry Dove talks about her experiences working with Todd in the Indiana Secretary of State's office. | | | Victoria Spartz Endorsed By Congresswoman Susan Brooks Another big endorsement this week: Congresswoman Susan Brooks endorsed Victoria Spartz to fill her seat in the 5th District! Congresswoman Susan Brooks said, "[Victoria Spartz] will change Washington and not let it change her. Her commitment will always be to the people of Indiana's Congressional 5th District" To follow along with Victora Spartz's campaign follow her on social media with the links below. | | Upcoming Events : Switzerland County Lincoln Day Dinner : Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner : Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner : Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. name: Chris Zook (Political Director)
subject: YOU'RE INVITED: GOTV Super Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Early voting has officially started and it is absolutely imperative that every single supporter gets out to cast their ballot for Wesley!

We can bring real change to this District and give Houston families the advocate they deserve in Congress. We have the opportunity to elect an independent leader who will put Houston first, fight for our energy workers, keep government overreach out of our neighborhoods and businesses, and improve the affordability of quality health care. But, we need your help to get there.

That's why **tomorrow, Saturday, October 17th, we are hosting a special Get Out The Vote (GOTV) Super Saturday** to remind voters that they can vote for Wesley today! Our neighbors in the 7th District all have the chance to join our mission and fight for the values important to this District, and by joining our GOTV Super Saturday you can ensure no District 7 resident is left behind.

Please join us at 10:00am for block-walking, phone-banking and text-banking at Hunt HQ located at 11511 Katy Freeway #105, 77079.

And, in honor of October being Breast Cancer Awareness Month, we're encouraging our volunteers to wear pink.

_**Where**_ : 11511 Katy Freeway, #105, 77079
_**When**_ : 10:00am, Saturday, October 17th
_**What**_ : GOTV Super Saturday

Remember that we only have 18 days left to flip this district and elect Wesley Hunt!

To RSVP email us back at [chris@wesleyfortexas.com](mailto:chris@wesleyfortexas.com)

Sincerely,
Chris

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Derek, what issues do you want Mark to focus on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

As we near one of the most consequential elections of our lifetimes, Mark Warner is continuing to work hard on the issues that matter most to Virginians. **He wants to hear from you, Derek.**

Throughout the pandemic Mark led efforts to keep Virginians safe and financially secure. He's fought to protect the U.S. Postal Service and guard the integrity of our elections. And he continues to work to make life better for Virginians on many fronts: ensuring our economy works for everyone, expanding access to affordable health care, and improving care for our veterans.

Now, as he heads toward an especially busy legislative session on Capitol Hill, Mark wants to know: **[What issues do you want him to focus on?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da2f/53d9897e/55516fb2/1c88f8af/3010734517/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-fallsurvey2")** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da2f/53d9897e/55516fb2/1c88f8af/3010734517/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-fallsurvey2")
---
[Take the survey now >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da2f/53d9897e/55516fb2/1c88f8af/3010734517/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-fallsurvey2")

Thank you,

Team Warner

Friend,
---
My Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher _refuses_ to debate me in front of the people she claims to represent.
---
She knows Texas voters would _never_ accept her anti-energy, anti-small business, anti-police record, so instead she’s hiding behind liberal mega-donors and the DCCC to try and beat me.
---
As a U.S. Army Captain, I promise you that I will always have the courage to face the public.
---
People _deserve_ to know why Lizzie Fletcher promised to be an independent voice in Congress, but votes with Pelosi 99% of the time, _so I’m circulating a petition forcing her to join me on the debate stage._
---
**_I’d be honored to have your signature next to mine._**
---

clean_body: Help me get my opponent on the stage | Friend, My Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher refuses to debate me in front of the people she claims to represent. She knows Texas voters would never accept her anti-energy, anti-small business, anti-police record, so instead she’s hiding behind liberal mega-donors and the DCCC to try and beat me. As a U.S. Army Captain, I promise you that I will always have the courage to face the public. People deserve to know why Lizzie Fletcher promised to be an independent voice in Congress, but votes with Pelosi 99% of the time, so I’m circulating a petition forcing her to join me on the debate stage. I’d be honored to have your signature next to mine. The truth is, Lizzie Fletcher is scared to face off against an Army Captain who represents the very American Dream her radical party is trying to destroy My family went from slavery to West Point in just five generations, and my presence in this race is living proof that in our country, anyone can make it with faith, hard work, and perseverance. I’m proud of my record of service and conservative values. Now, I want Lizzie Fletcher to own up to what she stands for before the people she claims to represent. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
October 14, 2020 - the day the most powerful monopolies in American history tried to hijack American democracy Peter, **Mark it down:_October 14, 2020_ —** the day the most powerful monopolies in American history tried to hijack American democracy by censoring the news and controlling Americans’ free speech. [**HELP ME FIGHT BACK! >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bd809072faae4ae885585f4346b84177&_e=fRMU707GdqJvnDxt0j7AiJVp6r4li59x0facxVEHoZz9YP1lyUszdiKgqpTGXN5ZaZyss8GtDOpYd5zAFoogchtOQfygkkvKYeDF60U3ofdhj_7NUk4tESLB0diUeSbgPYfMQTf_Zy7RNrftGTEoCtuVNbEClrFpS9NhY5wMAQ3iUXmcYk4nWVrtxt9O4ulw8vB2YkRfUWbd63bHDud7QqUzB7eTxGlMGlqXLTkrLhp_deelGUYfC3jeVSFEbzWN-Ft28oV_oMHiL6B8ub3Wxt1M1SSFt9dsyQN5vF_NqBmDI6ssSPcqbMfIBAfetcTXPnV0bzmXK5UbfMtVlapVEvuMhYSzDBdvdPxJbGniEZNjuPEddPpmR3DqgtwW3lgiGoiuheFEcyce66KsJUC1rJ0ZBqIPYUWx9URzZNZBVH8%3D) You may have heard the _New York Post_ released emails and text messages that reveal Hunter Biden used his father’s position to benefit himself by introducing Joe Biden to a Ukrainian businessman. Joe Biden has denied these allegations several times on the campaign trail.
**Now, Twitter and Facebook are actively shutting down social media pages and posts related to this story!** They have shut down President Trump’s Press Secretary, Kayleigh McEnaney’s, Twitter account after she shared the link to the Post’s article.
_**This is Big Tech censorship.**_ [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bd809072faae4ae885585f4346b84177&_e=fRMU707GdqJvnDxt0j7AiJVp6r4li59x0facxVEHoZz9YP1lyUszdiKgqpTGXN5ZaZyss8GtDOpYd5zAFoogchtOQfygkkvKYeDF60U3ofdhj_7NUk4tESLB0diUeSbgPYfMQTf_Zy7RNrftGTEoCtuVNbEClrFpS9NhY5wMAQ3iUXmcYk4nWVrtxt9O4ulw8vB2YkRfUWbd63bHDud7QhDgiDm5vzfoSiTa5P20WugjcdjwcEwrzMgZUtTXo5GyyEMLmdjxo6roSaozTu7F0yxEvR1DLIsEAWj4jKEEin6Q8kDS7Z8jXB0hjfptykBZpynwkXpVzr_r-89PjITolkAEnLhu2AzI7EohAdx98zipzn2U5f9TfrLO1YmCobZgMe4pHTWd7HrqbBSsmxitpAweEoQyilIQhobG_ikC-cg%3D) | |
---
These individuals violated our First Amendment rights to free speech so they could go on the defense for Presidential candidate Joe Biden.

Nearly 40% of Americans receive their news from Facebook and Twitter. **We CANNOT sit idly by while large corporations control what we say, what news we have access to, and what information we can share with others.**

_We must stand up to big tech monopolies_ now more than ever. With less that 20 days until the election, big tech is attempting to shape the narrative on the campaign trail rather than communicate what is really going on. All while Joe Biden continues to deny all allegations that he or his son have benefited from or engaged in quid pro quo with Burisma.

clean_body: October 14, 2020 - the day the most powerful monopolies in American history tried to hijack American democracy Peter, Mark it down:October 14, 2020 — the day the most powerful monopolies in American history tried to hijack American democracy by censoring the news and controlling Americans’ free speech. You may have heard the New York Post released emails and text messages that reveal Hunter Biden used his father’s position to benefit himself by introducing Joe Biden to a Ukrainian businessman. Joe Biden has denied these allegations several times on the campaign trail. Now, Twitter and Facebook are actively shutting down social media pages and posts related to this story! They have shut down President Trump’s Press Secretary, Kayleigh McEnaney’s, Twitter account after she shared the link to the Post’s article. This is Big Tech censorship. | | These individuals violated our First Amendment rights to free speech so they could go on the defense for Presidential candidate Joe Biden. Nearly 40% of Americans receive their news from Facebook and Twitter. We CANNOT sit idly by while large corporations control what we say, what news we have access to, and what information we can share with others. We must stand up to big tech monopolies now more than ever. With less that 20 days until the election, big tech is attempting to shape the narrative on the campaign trail rather than communicate what is really going on. All while Joe Biden continues to deny all allegations that he or his son have benefited from or engaged in quid pro quo with Burisma. Join me to reveal the truth and protect our First Amendment right to free speech! Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

| Dear Friends, Have you heard the latest? Massachusetts wants to collect an income tax from New Hampshire residents who are working remotely for Massachusetts companies. It’s outrageous but thankfully Governor Sununu has directed the New Hampshire Department of Justice to file a lawsuit to stop this foolishness. We shouldn’t be surprised though. Liberal Massachusetts has a spending and taxing problem, just like the Democrats in the New Hampshire Senate.

subject: Last call before our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
There's so much at stake -- and time is running out.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8196%2E868730%2ERsC289) Friend, Our mid-month deadline is at midnight tonight. You know what's at stake: Our opponent is on the air with a misleading ad even while he continues to sow right-wing extremist ideas. He's done that since he launched his campaign -- this ad should fool no one. But voters are voting right now, and we have to reach them with the truth: Washington state needs strong, decisive leadership, not a mini-Donald Trump. If we don't get the facts out, that might be who we get. **Before tonight's FINAL mid-month deadline, we need to hit our $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal to keep our ads on the air and reach as many Washington voters as possible:[Will you donate $5 or more right now, with so much on the line?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13203?t=4&akid=8196%2E868730%2ERsC289)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13204?t=5&akid=8196%2E868730%2ERsC289)
